(** * A library about decidable Real Numbers *)
(** Author: Catherine LELAY. Oct 2015 - *)

Require Export UniMath.Algebra.Groups.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Preamble.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Orders.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.
Require Import UniMath.OrderTheory.Lattice.Lattice.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.RealNumbers.Sets.
Require Import UniMath.RealNumbers.NonnegativeRationals.

Notations "_ / _" defined at level 40 with arguments
constr at level 40 and "_ / 2" defined at level 35
with arguments constr at next level
have incompatible prefixes.
One of them will likely not work.
[notation-incompatible-prefix,parsing,default]


Local Open Scope NR_scope.

(** ** Definition *)

(** *** [commring] *)

Definition hr_commring : commring := commrigtocommring NonnegativeReals.

Definition NR_to_hr : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals → hr_commring
  := setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)).

Definition nat_to_hr (n : nat) : hr_commring :=
  NR_to_hr (nat_to_NonnegativeReals n,,0).


∏ x : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
pr1 (NR_to_hr x) x


∏ x : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
pr1 (NR_to_hr x) x

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr1 (NR_to_hr x) x

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
∑ x0 : Dcuts,
(pr1 x + pr2 x + x0)%ring = (pr1 x + pr2 x + x0)%ring

  exists 0 ; reflexivity.
Qed.


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x
→ pr1 x - pr2 x = pr1 y - pr2 y


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x
→ pr1 x - pr2 x = pr1 y - pr2 y

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
H: pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x
pr1 x - pr2 x = pr1 y - pr2 y

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
H: pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x
pr1 x - pr2 x + pr2 x = pr1 y - pr2 y + pr2 x

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
H: pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x
maxNonnegativeReals (pr1 x) (pr2 x) =
pr1 y - pr2 y + pr2 x

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
H: pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x
maxNonnegativeReals (pr1 x) (pr2 x) + pr2 y =
pr1 y - pr2 y + pr2 x + pr2 y

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
H: pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x
maxNonnegativeReals (pr1 y + pr2 x) (pr2 x + pr2 y) =
pr1 y - pr2 y + pr2 x + pr2 y

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
H: pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x
pr1 y - pr2 y + pr2 y + pr2 x =
pr1 y - pr2 y + pr2 x + pr2 y

  now rewrite !isassoc_plusNonnegativeReals, (iscomm_plusNonnegativeReals (pr2 x)).
Qed.

→ pr1 x - pr2 x,, pr2 x - pr1 x =

isaprop

 refine (isasetdirprod _ _ _ _ _ _) ;
    apply (pr2 (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 NonnegativeReals)))).

  (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
(∑ x0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
 (pr1 x * pr2 y * x0)%multoperation =

→ pr1 x - pr2 x,, pr2 x - pr1 x =

(pr1 x * pr2 y * x0)%multoperation =
(pr1 y * pr2 x * x0)%multoperation
pr1 (pr1 x - pr2 x,, pr2 x - pr1 x) =
pr1 (pr1 y - pr2 y,, pr2 y - pr1 y)
x, y: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
  (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
c: ∑ x0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
(pr1 x * pr2 y * x0)%multoperation =
(pr1 y * pr2 x * x0)%multoperation
pr2 (pr1 x - pr2 x,, pr2 x - pr1 x) =
pr2 (pr1 y - pr2 y,, pr2 y - pr1 y)

  
x, y: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
  (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
c: ∑ x0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
(pr1 x * pr2 y * x0)%multoperation =

pr1 (pr1 x - pr2 x,, pr2 x - pr1 x) =

x, y: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
  (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
c: ∑ x0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
(pr1 x * pr2 y * x0)%multoperation =
(pr1 y * pr2 x * x0)%multoperation
pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x

    
x, y: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
  (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
c: ∑ x0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
(pr1 x * pr2 y * x0)%multoperation =
(pr1 y * pr2 x * x0)%multoperation
pr1 x + pr2 y + pr1 c = pr1 y + pr2 x + pr1 c

    exact (pr2 c).
  
x, y: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
  (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
c: ∑ x0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
(pr1 x * pr2 y * x0)%multoperation =
(pr1 y * pr2 x * x0)%multoperation
pr2 (pr1 x - pr2 x,, pr2 x - pr1 x) =
pr2 (pr1 y - pr2 y,, pr2 y - pr1 y)
 
x, y: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
  (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
c: ∑ x0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
(pr1 x * pr2 y * x0)%multoperation =
(pr1 y * pr2 x * x0)%multoperation
pr1 (pr2 x,, pr1 x) + pr2 (pr2 y,, pr1 y) =
pr1 (pr2 y,, pr1 y) + pr2 (pr2 x,, pr1 x)

    
x, y: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
  (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
c: ∑ x0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
(pr1 x * pr2 y * x0)%multoperation =
(pr1 y * pr2 x * x0)%multoperation
pr2 x + pr1 y = pr2 y + pr1 x

    
x, y: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
  (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
c: ∑ x0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
(pr1 x * pr2 y * x0)%multoperation =
(pr1 y * pr2 x * x0)%multoperation
pr1 y + pr2 x = pr1 x + pr2 y

    
x, y: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
  (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
c: ∑ x0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
(pr1 x * pr2 y * x0)%multoperation =
(pr1 y * pr2 x * x0)%multoperation
pr1 x + pr2 y + pr1 c = pr1 y + pr2 x + pr1 c

    exact (pr2 c).
Qed.

  (λ x : abmonoiddirprod

 apply iscomprelfun_hr_to_NR.
Defined.

Definition hr_to_NRpos (x : hr_commring) : NonnegativeReals := pr1 (hr_to_NR x).
Definition hr_to_NRneg (x : hr_commring) : NonnegativeReals := pr2 (hr_to_NR x).

x: pr1 X
pr1 X
  (hr_to_NR
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff
           (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) (pr1 x)))

x: pr1 X
pr1 X
  (setquotuniv
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))
     ((∑ _ : NonnegativeReals, NonnegativeReals),,

     iscomprelfun_hr_to_NR

pr1 X (pr11 x - pr21 x,, pr21 x - pr11 x)

pr1 X (pr1 x)
→ pr1 X (pr11 x - pr21 x,, pr21 x - pr11 x)

binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
  (pr1 x) (pr11 x - pr21 x,, pr21 x - pr11 x)

  
X: hr_commring
x: pr1 X
∑ x0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
(pr11 x * pr2 (pr11 x - pr21 x,, pr21 x - pr11 x) * x0)%multoperation =
(pr1 (pr11 x - pr21 x,, pr21 x - pr11 x) * pr21 x * x0)%multoperation

  
X: hr_commring
x: pr1 X
(pr11 x + (pr21 x - pr11 x)%NR + 0%NR)%ring =
((pr11 x - pr21 x)%NR + pr21 x + 0%NR)%ring

  
X: hr_commring

pr11 x + (pr21 x - pr11 x) + 0 =
pr11 x - pr21 x + pr21 x + 0

  
X: hr_commring
x: pr1 X
pr11 x + (pr21 x - pr11 x) = pr11 x - pr21 x + pr21 x

  
X: hr_commring
x: pr1 X
maxNonnegativeReals (pr21 x) (pr11 x) =
maxNonnegativeReals (pr11 x) (pr21 x)

  now apply iscomm_maxNonnegativeReals.
Qed.


∏ x : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
hr_to_NRpos (NR_to_hr x) = pr1 x - pr2 x


∏ x : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
hr_to_NRpos (NR_to_hr x) = pr1 x - pr2 x

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
hr_to_NRpos (NR_to_hr x) = pr1 x - pr2 x

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr1
  (setquotuniv
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))
     ((∑ _ : NonnegativeReals, NonnegativeReals),,
      isasetdirprod NonnegativeReals NonnegativeReals
        (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals))
        (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals)))
     (λ x : abmonoiddirprod
              (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
              (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals),
      pr1 x - pr2 x,, pr2 x - pr1 x)
     iscomprelfun_hr_to_NR
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff
           (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) x)) =
pr1 x - pr2 x

  now rewrite setquotunivcomm.
Qed.

∏ x : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
hr_to_NRneg (NR_to_hr x) = pr2 x - pr1 x


∏ x : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
hr_to_NRneg (NR_to_hr x) = pr2 x - pr1 x

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
hr_to_NRneg (NR_to_hr x) = pr2 x - pr1 x

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr2
  (setquotuniv
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))
     ((∑ _ : NonnegativeReals, NonnegativeReals),,
      isasetdirprod NonnegativeReals NonnegativeReals
        (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals))

     (λ x : abmonoiddirprod
              (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
              (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals),
      pr1 x - pr2 x,, pr2 x - pr1 x)
     iscomprelfun_hr_to_NR
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff
           (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) x)) =
pr2 x - pr1 x

  now rewrite setquotunivcomm.
Qed.


∏ x : hr_commring, NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x) = x

x: hr_commring
NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x) = x

  
x: hr_commring

  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
     (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) (hr_to_NR x) =
x

  
x: hr_commring
(λ p : hr_commring,
 setquotpr
   (binopeqrelabgrdiff
      (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) (hr_to_NR x) =
 p) x

  apply (setquotl0 _ x ((hr_to_NR x),,(hr_to_NR_correct x))).
Qed.


∏ x : hr_commring,
0 < hr_to_NRpos x → hr_to_NRneg x = 0


∏ x : hr_commring,
0 < hr_to_NRpos x → hr_to_NRneg x = 0

  
x: hr_commring
0 < hr_to_NRpos x → hr_to_NRneg x = 0

  
x: hr_commring
0 < hr_to_NRpos (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
→ hr_to_NRneg (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x)) = 0

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
0 < hr_to_NRpos (NR_to_hr x)
→ hr_to_NRneg (NR_to_hr x) = 0

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
0 < pr1 x - pr2 x → pr2 x - pr1 x = 0

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: 0 < pr1 x - pr2 x
pr2 x - pr1 x = 0

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: 0 < pr1 x - pr2 x
pr2 x <= pr1 x

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: 0 < pr1 x - pr2 x
pr2 x < pr1 x

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: 0 < pr1 x - pr2 x
0 < pr1 x - pr2 x

  exact Hx.
Qed.

∏ x : hr_commring,
0 < hr_to_NRneg x → hr_to_NRpos x = 0


∏ x : hr_commring,
0 < hr_to_NRneg x → hr_to_NRpos x = 0

  
x: hr_commring
0 < hr_to_NRneg x → hr_to_NRpos x = 0

  
x: hr_commring
0 < hr_to_NRneg (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
→ hr_to_NRpos (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x)) = 0

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
0 < hr_to_NRneg (NR_to_hr x)
→ hr_to_NRpos (NR_to_hr x) = 0

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
0 < pr2 x - pr1 x → pr1 x - pr2 x = 0

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: 0 < pr2 x - pr1 x
pr1 x - pr2 x = 0

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: 0 < pr2 x - pr1 x
pr1 x <= pr2 x

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: 0 < pr2 x - pr1 x
pr1 x < pr2 x

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: 0 < pr2 x - pr1 x
0 < pr2 x - pr1 x

  exact Hx.
Qed.


∏ x : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
(0 < pr1 x → pr2 x = 0)
→ hr_to_NRpos (NR_to_hr x) = pr1 x


∏ x : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
(0 < pr1 x → pr2 x = 0)
→ hr_to_NRpos (NR_to_hr x) = pr1 x

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: 0 < pr1 x → pr2 x = 0
hr_to_NRpos (NR_to_hr x) = pr1 x

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: 0 < pr1 x → pr2 x = 0
pr1 x - pr2 x = pr1 x

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: 0 < pr1 x → pr2 x = 0
pr1 x - pr2 x + pr2 x = pr1 x + pr2 x

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: 0 < pr1 x → pr2 x = 0
maxNonnegativeReals (pr1 x) (pr2 x) = pr1 x + pr2 x

  now apply max_plusNonnegativeReals.
Qed.

x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: 0 < pr1 x → pr2 x = 0

x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals

maxNonnegativeReals (pr1 x) (pr2 x) = pr1 x + pr2 x

(** Caracterisation of equality *)

pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x <->
NR_to_hr x = NR_to_hr y

NR_to_hr x = NR_to_hr y

NR_to_hr x = NR_to_hr y

NR_to_hr x = NR_to_hr y

NR_to_hr x = NR_to_hr y

  y

H: pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x

(pr1 x * pr2 y * x0)%multoperation =
(pr1 y * pr2 x * x0)%multoperation

(pr1 y * pr2 x * 0)%multoperation

H: pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x
(pr1 x * pr2 y)%multoperation =
(pr1 y * pr2 x)%multoperation

    exact H.
  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
H: NR_to_hr x = NR_to_hr y
pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x
 
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals) x
  y → pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x

    
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
isaprop (pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x)
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
(∑ x0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
 (pr1 x * pr2 y * x0)%multoperation =
 (pr1 y * pr2 x * x0)%multoperation)
→ pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x

    
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
isaprop (pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x)
 apply (pr2 (pr1 (pr1 (pr1 NonnegativeReals)))). 
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
(∑ x0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
 (pr1 x * pr2 y * x0)%multoperation =
 (pr1 y * pr2 x * x0)%multoperation)
→ pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x

    
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
c: rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals
(pr1 x * pr2 y * c)%multoperation =
(pr1 y * pr2 x * c)%multoperation
→ pr1 x + pr2 y = pr1 y + pr2 x

    apply plusNonnegativeReals_eqcompat_l.
Qed.

(** *** Constants and Operations *)

(** 0 *)


hr_to_NR 0%ring = 0,, 0


hr_to_NR 0%ring = 0,, 0

  
hr_to_NR 0%addmonoid = 0,, 0

  
setquotuniv
  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
     (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))
  ((∑ _ : NonnegativeReals, NonnegativeReals),,
   isasetdirprod NonnegativeReals NonnegativeReals
     (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals))
     (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals)))
  (λ x : abmonoiddirprod
           (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
           (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals),
   pr1 x - pr2 x,, pr2 x - pr1 x)
  iscomprelfun_hr_to_NR 0%addmonoid = 0,, 0

  
0%addmonoid - 0%addmonoid,, 0%addmonoid - 0%addmonoid =
0,, 0

  
0,, 0 = 0,, 0
0%addmonoid <= 0%addmonoid

  
0,, 0 = 0,, 0
 reflexivity. 
0%addmonoid <= 0%addmonoid

  apply isrefl_leNonnegativeReals.
Qed.

(** 1 *)


hr_to_NR 1%ring = 1,, 0


hr_to_NR 1%ring = 1,, 0

  
hr_to_NR (rigtoringunel2 Dcuts_commrig) = 1,, 0

  
setquotuniv
  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
     (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))
  ((∑ _ : NonnegativeReals, NonnegativeReals),,
   isasetdirprod NonnegativeReals NonnegativeReals
     (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals))
     (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals)))
  (λ x : abmonoiddirprod
           (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
           (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals),
   pr1 x - pr2 x,, pr2 x - pr1 x)
  iscomprelfun_hr_to_NR
  (setquotpr (eqrelrigtoring Dcuts_commrig)
     (rigtoringunel2int Dcuts_commrig)) = 1,, 0

  
1%rig - 0%rig,, 0%rig - 1%rig = 1,, 0

  
?y,, 0%rig - 1%rig = 1,, 0
1%rig = ?y + 0%rig

  
?y,, 0%rig - 1%rig = 1,, 0
 
?y,, 0 = 1,, 0
0%rig <= 1%rig

    
?y,, 0 = 1,, 0
 reflexivity.
    
0%rig <= 1%rig
 apply isnonnegative_NonnegativeReals.
  
1%rig = 1 + 0%rig
 apply pathsinv0, isrunit_zero_plusNonnegativeReals.
Qed.

(** plus *)


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
(NR_to_hr x + NR_to_hr y)%ring =
NR_to_hr (pr1 x + pr1 y,, pr2 x + pr2 y)


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
(NR_to_hr x + NR_to_hr y)%ring =
NR_to_hr (pr1 x + pr1 y,, pr2 x + pr2 y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
(NR_to_hr x + NR_to_hr y)%ring =
NR_to_hr (pr1 x + pr1 y,, pr2 x + pr2 y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
rigtoringop1 Dcuts_commrig (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y) =
NR_to_hr (pr1 x + pr1 y,, pr2 x + pr2 y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
setquotfun2
  (hrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig))
  (eqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig))
  (λ xy xy' : Dcuts × Dcuts,
   (pr1 xy + pr1 xy')%ring,, (pr2 xy + pr2 xy')%ring)
  (iscompbinoptransrel
     (hrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig))
     (eqreltrans
        (eqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig)))
     (isbinophrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig))) (NR_to_hr x)
  (NR_to_hr y) =
NR_to_hr (pr1 x + pr1 y,, pr2 x + pr2 y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
setquotfun2
  (hrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig))
  (eqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig))
  (λ xy xy' : Dcuts × Dcuts,
   (pr1 xy + pr1 xy')%ring,, (pr2 xy + pr2 xy')%ring)
  (iscompbinoptransrel
     (hrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig))
     (eqreltrans
        (eqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig)))
     (isbinophrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig)))
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) x)
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) y) =
setquotpr
  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
     (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))
  (pr1 x + pr1 y,, pr2 x + pr2 y)

  apply (setquotfun2comm (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))).
Qed.

(** opp *)


∏ x : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
(- NR_to_hr x)%ring = NR_to_hr (pr2 x,, pr1 x)


∏ x : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
(- NR_to_hr x)%ring = NR_to_hr (pr2 x,, pr1 x)

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
(- NR_to_hr x)%ring = NR_to_hr (pr2 x,, pr1 x)

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
abgrdiffinv (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig)
  (NR_to_hr x) = NR_to_hr (pr2 x,, pr1 x)

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
setquotfun
  (hrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig))
  (eqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig))
  (abgrdiffinvint (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig))
  (abgrdiffinvcomp (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig))
  (NR_to_hr x) = NR_to_hr (pr2 x,, pr1 x)

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
setquotfun
  (hrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig))
  (eqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig))
  (abgrdiffinvint (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig))
  (abgrdiffinvcomp (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig))
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) x) =
setquotpr
  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
     (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))
  (pr2 x,, pr1 x)

  apply (setquotfuncomm (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))).
Qed.


∏ x : hr_commring,
hr_to_NR (- x)%ring = hr_to_NRneg x,, hr_to_NRpos x


∏ x : hr_commring,
hr_to_NR (- x)%ring = hr_to_NRneg x,, hr_to_NRpos x

  
x: hr_commring
hr_to_NR (- x)%ring = hr_to_NRneg x,, hr_to_NRpos x

  
x: hr_commring
hr_to_NR
  (NR_to_hr (pr2 (hr_to_NR x),, pr1 (hr_to_NR x))) =
hr_to_NRneg (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x)),,
hr_to_NRpos (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))

  
x: hr_commring
hr_to_NR
  (NR_to_hr (pr2 (hr_to_NR x),, pr1 (hr_to_NR x))) =
pr2 (hr_to_NR (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))),,
pr1 (hr_to_NR (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x)))

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
hr_to_NR (NR_to_hr (pr2 x,, pr1 x)) =
pr2 (hr_to_NR (NR_to_hr x)),,
pr1 (hr_to_NR (NR_to_hr x))

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
setquotuniv
  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
     (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))
  ((∑ _ : NonnegativeReals, NonnegativeReals),,
   isasetdirprod NonnegativeReals NonnegativeReals
     (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals))
     (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals)))
  (λ x : abmonoiddirprod
           (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
           (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals),
   pr1 x - pr2 x,, pr2 x - pr1 x)
  iscomprelfun_hr_to_NR
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))
     (pr2 x,, pr1 x)) =
pr2
  (setquotuniv
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))
     ((∑ _ : NonnegativeReals, NonnegativeReals),,
      isasetdirprod NonnegativeReals NonnegativeReals
        (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals))
        (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals)))
     (λ x : abmonoiddirprod
              (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
              (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals),
      pr1 x - pr2 x,, pr2 x - pr1 x)
     iscomprelfun_hr_to_NR
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff
           (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) x)),,
pr1
  (setquotuniv
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))
     ((∑ _ : NonnegativeReals, NonnegativeReals),,
      isasetdirprod NonnegativeReals NonnegativeReals
        (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals))
        (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals)))
     (λ x : abmonoiddirprod
              (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
              (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals),
      pr1 x - pr2 x,, pr2 x - pr1 x)
     iscomprelfun_hr_to_NR
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff
           (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) x))

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr1 (pr2 x,, pr1 x) - pr2 (pr2 x,, pr1 x),,
pr2 (pr2 x,, pr1 x) - pr1 (pr2 x,, pr1 x) =
pr2 (pr1 x - pr2 x,, pr2 x - pr1 x),,
pr1 (pr1 x - pr2 x,, pr2 x - pr1 x)

  reflexivity.
Qed.

∏ x : hr_commring,
hr_to_NRpos (- x)%ring = hr_to_NRneg x


∏ x : hr_commring,
hr_to_NRpos (- x)%ring = hr_to_NRneg x

  
x: hr_commring
hr_to_NRpos (- x)%ring = hr_to_NRneg x

  
x: hr_commring
pr1 (hr_to_NR (- x)%ring) = hr_to_NRneg x

  now rewrite hr_to_NR_opp.
Qed.

∏ x : hr_commring,
hr_to_NRneg (- x)%ring = hr_to_NRpos x


∏ x : hr_commring,
hr_to_NRneg (- x)%ring = hr_to_NRpos x

  
x: hr_commring
hr_to_NRneg (- x)%ring = hr_to_NRpos x

  
x: hr_commring
pr2 (hr_to_NR (- x)%ring) = hr_to_NRpos x

  now rewrite hr_to_NR_opp.
Qed.

(** minus *)


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
(NR_to_hr x - NR_to_hr y)%ring =
NR_to_hr (pr1 x + pr2 y,, pr2 x + pr1 y)


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
(NR_to_hr x - NR_to_hr y)%ring =
NR_to_hr (pr1 x + pr2 y,, pr2 x + pr1 y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
(NR_to_hr x - NR_to_hr y)%ring =
NR_to_hr (pr1 x + pr2 y,, pr2 x + pr1 y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
NR_to_hr
  (pr1 x + pr1 (pr2 y,, pr1 y),,
   pr2 x + pr2 (pr2 y,, pr1 y)) =
NR_to_hr (pr1 x + pr2 y,, pr2 x + pr1 y)

  reflexivity.
Qed.


∏ x y : hr_commring,
(x - y)%ring = (- (- x - - y))%ring


∏ x y : hr_commring,
(x - y)%ring = (- (- x - - y))%ring

  
x, y: hr_commring
(x - y)%ring = (- (- x - - y))%ring

  
x, y: hr_commring
(NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x) - NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))%ring =
(- (- NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x) - - NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y)))%ring

  
x, y: hr_commring
NR_to_hr
  (pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR y),,
   pr2 (hr_to_NR x) + pr1 (hr_to_NR y)) =
NR_to_hr
  (pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR y),,
   pr2 (hr_to_NR x) + pr1 (hr_to_NR y))

  reflexivity.
Qed.


∏ x y : hr_commring,
hr_to_NRpos x - hr_to_NRpos y <=
hr_to_NRpos (x - y)%ring


∏ x y : hr_commring,
hr_to_NRpos x - hr_to_NRpos y <=
hr_to_NRpos (x - y)%ring

  
X, Y: hr_commring
hr_to_NRpos X - hr_to_NRpos Y <=
hr_to_NRpos (X - Y)%ring

  
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
x - y <= hr_to_NRpos (X - Y)%ring

  
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
x - y <=
hr_to_NRpos
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X) - NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))%ring

  
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
x - y <=
hr_to_NRpos
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y),,
      pr2 (hr_to_NR X) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Y)))

  
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
x - y <=
hr_to_NRpos
  (NR_to_hr
     (x + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y),,
      pr2 (hr_to_NR X) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Y)))

  
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
x - y <=
hr_to_NRpos
  (NR_to_hr
     (x + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y),, pr2 (hr_to_NR X) + y))

  
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
x - y <=
hr_to_NRpos
  (NR_to_hr (x + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y),, hr_to_NRneg X + y))

  
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
x - y <=
hr_to_NRpos
  (NR_to_hr (x + hr_to_NRneg Y,, hr_to_NRneg X + y))

  
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
x - y <=
pr1 (x + hr_to_NRneg Y,, hr_to_NRneg X + y) -
pr2 (x + hr_to_NRneg Y,, hr_to_NRneg X + y)

  
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
x - y <= x + hr_to_NRneg Y - (hr_to_NRneg X + y)

  
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
x - y + (hr_to_NRneg X + y) <=
x + hr_to_NRneg Y - (hr_to_NRneg X + y) +
(hr_to_NRneg X + y)

  
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
x - y + (hr_to_NRneg X + y) <=
maxNonnegativeReals (x + hr_to_NRneg Y)
  (hr_to_NRneg X + y)

  
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
maxNonnegativeReals x y + hr_to_NRneg X <=
maxNonnegativeReals (x + hr_to_NRneg Y)
  (y + hr_to_NRneg X)

  
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
maxNonnegativeReals (x + hr_to_NRneg X)
  (y + hr_to_NRneg X) <=
maxNonnegativeReals (x + hr_to_NRneg Y)
  (y + hr_to_NRneg X)

  
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
x + hr_to_NRneg X <=
maxNonnegativeReals (x + hr_to_NRneg Y)
  (y + hr_to_NRneg X)
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
y + hr_to_NRneg X <=
maxNonnegativeReals (x + hr_to_NRneg Y)
  (y + hr_to_NRneg X)

  
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
x + hr_to_NRneg X <=
maxNonnegativeReals (x + hr_to_NRneg Y)
  (y + hr_to_NRneg X)
 
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
maxNonnegativeReals x (hr_to_NRneg X) <=
maxNonnegativeReals (x + hr_to_NRneg Y)
  (y + hr_to_NRneg X)
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
0 < x → hr_to_NRneg X = 0

    
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
maxNonnegativeReals x (hr_to_NRneg X) <=
maxNonnegativeReals (x + hr_to_NRneg Y)
  (y + hr_to_NRneg X)
 
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
x <=
maxNonnegativeReals (x + hr_to_NRneg Y)
  (y + hr_to_NRneg X)
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
hr_to_NRneg X <=
maxNonnegativeReals (x + hr_to_NRneg Y)
  (y + hr_to_NRneg X)

      
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
x <=
maxNonnegativeReals (x + hr_to_NRneg Y)
  (y + hr_to_NRneg X)
 
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
x <= x + hr_to_NRneg Y

        apply plusNonnegativeReals_le_l.
      
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
hr_to_NRneg X <=
maxNonnegativeReals (x + hr_to_NRneg Y)
  (y + hr_to_NRneg X)
 
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
hr_to_NRneg X <= y + hr_to_NRneg X

        apply plusNonnegativeReals_le_r.
    
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
0 < x → hr_to_NRneg X = 0
 apply hr_to_NRposneg_zero.
  
X, Y: hr_commring
x:= hr_to_NRpos X: NonnegativeReals
y:= hr_to_NRpos Y: NonnegativeReals
y + hr_to_NRneg X <=
maxNonnegativeReals (x + hr_to_NRneg Y)
  (y + hr_to_NRneg X)
 apply maxNonnegativeReals_le_r.
Qed.

∏ x y : hr_commring,
hr_to_NRneg x - hr_to_NRneg y <=
hr_to_NRneg (x - y)%ring


∏ x y : hr_commring,
hr_to_NRneg x - hr_to_NRneg y <=
hr_to_NRneg (x - y)%ring

  
x, y: hr_commring
hr_to_NRneg x - hr_to_NRneg y <=
hr_to_NRneg (x - y)%ring

  
x, y: hr_commring
hr_to_NRneg x - hr_to_NRneg y <=
hr_to_NRneg (- (- x - - y))%ring

  
x, y: hr_commring
hr_to_NRneg (- - x)%abgr - hr_to_NRneg (- - y)%abgr <=
hr_to_NRneg (- (- x - - y))%ring

  
x, y: hr_commring
hr_to_NRneg (- - x)%ring - hr_to_NRneg (- - y)%ring <=
hr_to_NRneg (- (- x - - y))%ring

  
x, y: hr_commring
hr_to_NRpos (- x)%ring - hr_to_NRpos (- y)%ring <=
hr_to_NRpos (- x - - y)%ring

  apply hr_to_NRpos_minus.
Qed.

(** mult *)


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
(NR_to_hr x * NR_to_hr y)%ring =
NR_to_hr
  (pr1 x * pr1 y + pr2 x * pr2 y,,
   pr1 x * pr2 y + pr2 x * pr1 y)


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
(NR_to_hr x * NR_to_hr y)%ring =
NR_to_hr
  (pr1 x * pr1 y + pr2 x * pr2 y,,
   pr1 x * pr2 y + pr2 x * pr1 y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
(NR_to_hr x * NR_to_hr y)%ring =
NR_to_hr
  (pr1 x * pr1 y + pr2 x * pr2 y,,
   pr1 x * pr2 y + pr2 x * pr1 y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
rigtoringop2 Dcuts_commrig (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y) =
NR_to_hr
  (pr1 x * pr1 y + pr2 x * pr2 y,,
   pr1 x * pr2 y + pr2 x * pr1 y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
setquotfun2
  (hrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig))
  (eqrelrigtoring Dcuts_commrig)
  (rigtoringop2int Dcuts_commrig)
  (rigtoringop2comp Dcuts_commrig) (NR_to_hr x)
  (NR_to_hr y) =
NR_to_hr
  (pr1 x * pr1 y + pr2 x * pr2 y,,
   pr1 x * pr2 y + pr2 x * pr1 y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
setquotfun2
  (hrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid Dcuts_commrig))
  (eqrelrigtoring Dcuts_commrig)
  (rigtoringop2int Dcuts_commrig)
  (rigtoringop2comp Dcuts_commrig)
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) x)
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) y) =
setquotpr
  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
     (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))
  (pr1 x * pr1 y + pr2 x * pr2 y,,
   pr1 x * pr2 y + pr2 x * pr1 y)

  apply (setquotfun2comm (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))).
Qed.

(** *** Order *)
(** [hr_lt_rel] *)


isbinophrel ltNonnegativeReals


isbinophrel ltNonnegativeReals

  
∏ a b c : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
ltNonnegativeReals a b
→ ltNonnegativeReals (c * a)%multoperation
    (c * b)%multoperation
∏ a b c : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
ltNonnegativeReals a b
→ ltNonnegativeReals (a * c)%multoperation
    (b * c)%multoperation

  
∏ a b c : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
ltNonnegativeReals a b
→ ltNonnegativeReals (c * a)%multoperation
    (c * b)%multoperation
 
x, y, z: rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals
Hlt: ltNonnegativeReals x y
ltNonnegativeReals (z * x)%multoperation
  (z * y)%multoperation

    apply plusNonnegativeReals_ltcompat_r, Hlt.
  
∏ a b c : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
ltNonnegativeReals a b
→ ltNonnegativeReals (a * c)%multoperation
    (b * c)%multoperation
 
x, y, z: rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals
Hlt: ltNonnegativeReals x y
ltNonnegativeReals (x * z)%multoperation
  (y * z)%multoperation

    apply plusNonnegativeReals_ltcompat_l, Hlt.
Qed.
Definition hr_lt_rel : hrel hr_commring
  := rigtoringrel NonnegativeReals isbinophrel_ltNonnegativeReals.


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
pr1 x + pr2 y < pr1 y + pr2 x <->
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
pr1 x + pr2 y < pr1 y + pr2 x <->
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr1 x + pr2 y < pr1 y + pr2 x <->
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr1 x + pr2 y < pr1 y + pr2 x
→ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)
→ pr1 x + pr2 y < pr1 y + pr2 x

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr1 x + pr2 y < pr1 y + pr2 x
→ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)
 
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
H: pr1 x + pr2 y < pr1 y + pr2 x
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)

    
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
H: pr1 x + pr2 y < pr1 y + pr2 x
Dcuts_lt_rel (pr1 x + pr2 y + 0%NR)%ring
  (pr1 y + pr2 x + 0%NR)%ring

    apply plusNonnegativeReals_ltcompat_l, H.
  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)
→ pr1 x + pr2 y < pr1 y + pr2 x
 
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
H: ∑ c0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
ltNonnegativeReals
  (pr111 (invweq
            (weqsubtypesdirprod
               (pr11 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y)))
               (pr12 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y))))
            (make_dirprod
               (x,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) x)
               (y,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) y))) *
   pr221 (invweq
            (weqsubtypesdirprod
               (pr11 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y)))
               (pr12 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y))))
            (make_dirprod
               (x,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) x)
               (y,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) y))) *
   c0)%multoperation
  (pr121 (invweq
            (weqsubtypesdirprod
               (pr11 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y)))
               (pr12 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y))))
            (make_dirprod
               (x,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) x)
               (y,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) y))) *
   pr211 (invweq
            (weqsubtypesdirprod
               (pr11 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y)))
               (pr12 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y))))
            (make_dirprod
               (x,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) x)
               (y,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) y))) *
   c0)%multoperation
pr1 x + pr2 y < pr1 y + pr2 x

    
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
H: ∑ c0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
ltNonnegativeReals
  (pr111 (invweq
            (weqsubtypesdirprod
               (pr11 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y)))
               (pr12 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y))))
            (make_dirprod
               (x,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) x)
               (y,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) y))) *
   pr221 (invweq
            (weqsubtypesdirprod
               (pr11 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y)))
               (pr12 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y))))
            (make_dirprod
               (x,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) x)
               (y,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) y))) *
   c0)%multoperation
  (pr121 (invweq
            (weqsubtypesdirprod
               (pr11 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y)))
               (pr12 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y))))
            (make_dirprod
               (x,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) x)
               (y,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) y))) *
   pr211 (invweq
            (weqsubtypesdirprod
               (pr11 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y)))
               (pr12 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y))))
            (make_dirprod
               (x,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) x)
               (y,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) y))) *
   c0)%multoperation
pr1 x + pr2 y + pr1 H < pr1 y + pr2 x + pr1 H

    exact (pr2 H).
Qed.

(** [hr_le_rel] *)


isbinophrel leNonnegativeReals


isbinophrel leNonnegativeReals

  
∏ a b c : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
leNonnegativeReals a b
→ leNonnegativeReals (c * a)%multoperation
    (c * b)%multoperation
∏ a b c : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
leNonnegativeReals a b
→ leNonnegativeReals (a * c)%multoperation
    (b * c)%multoperation

  
∏ a b c : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
leNonnegativeReals a b
→ leNonnegativeReals (c * a)%multoperation
    (c * b)%multoperation
 
x, y, z: rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals
Hlt: leNonnegativeReals x y
leNonnegativeReals (z * x)%multoperation
  (z * y)%multoperation

    apply plusNonnegativeReals_lecompat_r, Hlt.
  
∏ a b c : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
leNonnegativeReals a b
→ leNonnegativeReals (a * c)%multoperation
    (b * c)%multoperation
 
x, y, z: rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals
Hlt: leNonnegativeReals x y
leNonnegativeReals (x * z)%multoperation
  (y * z)%multoperation

    apply plusNonnegativeReals_lecompat_l, Hlt.
Qed.
Definition hr_le_rel : hrel hr_commring
  := rigtoringrel NonnegativeReals isbinophrel_leNonnegativeReals.


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
pr1 x + pr2 y <= pr1 y + pr2 x <->
hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
pr1 x + pr2 y <= pr1 y + pr2 x <->
hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr1 x + pr2 y <= pr1 y + pr2 x <->

→ hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)

(** Theorems about order *)


∏ X Y : hr_commring, ¬ hr_lt_rel X Y <-> hr_le_rel Y X


∏ X Y : hr_commring, ¬ hr_lt_rel X Y <-> hr_le_rel Y X

  
x, y: hr_commring
¬ hr_lt_rel x y <-> hr_le_rel y x

  
x, y: hr_commring
¬ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y)) <->
hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))

  
x, y: hr_commring
H: ¬ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
x, y: hr_commring
H: hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
¬ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))

  
x, y: hr_commring
H: ¬ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
 
x, y: hr_commring
H: ¬ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
pr1 (hr_to_NR y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR x) <=
pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR y)

    
x, y: hr_commring
H: ¬ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
¬ (pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR y) <
   pr1 (hr_to_NR y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR x))

    
x, y: hr_commring
H: ¬ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
H0: pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR y) <
pr1 (hr_to_NR y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR x)
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))

    
x, y: hr_commring
H: ¬ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
H0: pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR y) <
pr1 (hr_to_NR y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR x)
pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR y) <
pr1 (hr_to_NR y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR x)

    exact H0.
  
x, y: hr_commring
H: hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
¬ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
 
x, y: hr_commring
H: hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
H0: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
∅

    
x, y: hr_commring
H: hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
H0: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
?Goal0 <= ?Goal
x, y: hr_commring
H: hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
H0: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
?Goal < ?Goal0

    
x, y: hr_commring
H: hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
H0: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
?Goal0 <= ?Goal
 
x, y: hr_commring
H: hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
H0: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr ?Goal0) (NR_to_hr ?Goal1)

      apply H.
    
x, y: hr_commring
H: hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
H0: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR y) <
pr1 (hr_to_NR y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR x)
 
x, y: hr_commring
H: hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
H0: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))

      exact H0.
Qed.


∏ X Y : hr_commring, hr_lt_rel X Y → hr_le_rel X Y


∏ X Y : hr_commring, hr_lt_rel X Y → hr_le_rel X Y

  
x, y: hr_commring
hr_lt_rel x y → hr_le_rel x y

  
x, y: hr_commring
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
→ hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))

  
x, y: hr_commring
H: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))

  
x, y: hr_commring
H: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR y) <=
pr1 (hr_to_NR y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR x)

  
x, y: hr_commring
H: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR y) <
pr1 (hr_to_NR y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR x)

  
x, y: hr_commring
H: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))

  exact H.
Qed.


isantisymm hr_le_rel


isantisymm hr_le_rel

  
isantisymm leNonnegativeReals

  
X, Y: rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals
Hxy: leNonnegativeReals X Y
Hyx: leNonnegativeReals Y X
X = Y

  
X, Y: rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals
Hxy: leNonnegativeReals X Y
Hyx: leNonnegativeReals Y X
X <= Y × Y <= X

  now split.
Qed.


isStrongOrder hr_lt_rel


isStrongOrder hr_lt_rel

  
isStrongOrder ltNonnegativeReals

  
istrans ltNonnegativeReals
iscotrans ltNonnegativeReals
isirrefl ltNonnegativeReals

  
istrans ltNonnegativeReals
 exact istrans_ltNonnegativeReals.
  
iscotrans ltNonnegativeReals
 exact iscotrans_ltNonnegativeReals.
  
isirrefl ltNonnegativeReals
 exact isirrefl_ltNonnegativeReals.
Qed.


iscotrans hr_lt_rel


iscotrans hr_lt_rel

  
isStrongOrder hr_lt_rel

  apply isStrongOrder_hr_lt.
Qed.


∏ x : hr_commring,
hr_to_NRneg x = 0 <-> hr_le_rel 0%ring x


∏ x : hr_commring,
hr_to_NRneg x = 0 <-> hr_le_rel 0%ring x

  
x: hr_commring
hr_to_NRneg x = 0 <-> hr_le_rel 0%ring x

  
x: hr_commring
(λ p : hr_commring,
 hr_to_NRneg x = 0 <-> hr_le_rel 0%ring p) x

  
x: hr_commring
hr_to_NRneg x = 0 <->
hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (0,, 0)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))

  
x: hr_commring
pr2 (hr_to_NR x) = 0 <->
hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (0,, 0)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))

→ hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (0,, 0)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
x: hr_commring

→ pr2 (hr_to_NR x) = 0

→ hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (0,, 0)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))

∏ d : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
pr2 d = 0 → hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (0,, 0)) (NR_to_hr d)

hx: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr2 hx = 0
→ hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (0,, 0)) (NR_to_hr hx)

hx: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr2 (pr1 hx,, pr2 hx) = 0
→ hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (0,, 0))
    (NR_to_hr (pr1 hx,, pr2 hx))

    
x: hr_commring
hx: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
∏ p p0 : NonnegativeReals,
pr2 (p,, p0) = 0
→ hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (0,, 0)) (NR_to_hr (p,, p0))

    
x: hr_commring
∏ p p0 : NonnegativeReals,
pr2 (p,, p0) = 0
→ hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (0,, 0)) (NR_to_hr (p,, p0))

    
x1: NonnegativeReals
hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (0,, 0)) (NR_to_hr (x1,, 0))

    
x1: NonnegativeReals
0 + 0 <= x1 + 0

    
x1: NonnegativeReals
0 <= x1

    now apply isnonnegative_NonnegativeReals.
  
x: hr_commring
hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (0,, 0)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
→ pr2 (hr_to_NR x) = 0
 
x: hr_commring
(λ p : hr_commring,
 hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (0,, 0)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
 → pr2 (hr_to_NR p) = 0) x

    
x: hr_commring
hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (0,, 0)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
→ pr2 (hr_to_NR (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))) = 0

    
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (0,, 0)) (NR_to_hr x)
pr2 (hr_to_NR (NR_to_hr x)) = 0

    
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (0,, 0)) (NR_to_hr x)
pr2
  (setquotuniv
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))
     ((∑ _ : NonnegativeReals, NonnegativeReals),,
      isasetdirprod NonnegativeReals NonnegativeReals
        (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals))
        (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals)))
     (λ x : abmonoiddirprod
              (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
              (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals),
      pr1 x - pr2 x,, pr2 x - pr1 x)
     iscomprelfun_hr_to_NR
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff
           (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) x)) = 0

    
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: hr_le_rel (NR_to_hr (0,, 0)) (NR_to_hr x)
pr2 x - pr1 x = 0

    
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: pr1 (0,, 0) + pr2 x <= pr1 x + pr2 (0,, 0)
pr2 x - pr1 x = 0

    
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: pr2 x <= pr1 x
pr2 x - pr1 x = 0

    now apply minusNonnegativeReals_eq_zero.
Qed.

0 + 0 < x1 + 0

0 < x1

  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))

hr_to_NRpos x ≠ 0

hr_to_NRpos x ≠ 0

    
x: hr_commring
X: pr2 (hr_to_NR x) < pr1 (hr_to_NR x)
0 < hr_to_NRpos x

    
x: hr_commring
X: pr2 (hr_to_NR x) < pr1 (hr_to_NR x)

hr_to_NRneg x = 0

  (setquotuniv
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))
     ((∑ _ : NonnegativeReals, NonnegativeReals),,
      isasetdirprod NonnegativeReals NonnegativeReals
        (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals))
        (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals)))
     (λ x : abmonoiddirprod
              (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)

     iscomprelfun_hr_to_NR

pr1 x - pr2 x = 0

    
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals

pr1 x - pr2 x = 0

    
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
Hx: pr1 x <= pr2 x
pr1 x - pr2 x = 0

    now apply minusNonnegativeReals_eq_zero.

∏ x y z : hr_commring,
hr_lt_rel y z <-> hr_lt_rel (y + x)%ring (z + x)%ring


∏ x y z : hr_commring,
hr_lt_rel y z <-> hr_lt_rel (y + x)%ring (z + x)%ring

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
hr_lt_rel Y Z <-> hr_lt_rel (Y + X)%ring (Z + X)%ring

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z)) <->
hr_lt_rel
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y) + NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))%ring
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z) + NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))%ring

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z)) <->
hr_lt_rel
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z))
hr_lt_rel
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel
(NR_to_hr
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
(NR_to_hr
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z))

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z))
hr_lt_rel
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
 
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z))
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)) <
pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X))

    
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z))
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) +
 (pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X))) <
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) +
 (pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))

    
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z))
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) +
(pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)) <
pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) +
(pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X))

    
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z))
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X) <
pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)

Hlt: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z))
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) <
pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)

    now apply_pr2 NR_to_hr_lt.
  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel
(NR_to_hr
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
(NR_to_hr
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z))

Hlt: hr_lt_rel
(NR_to_hr
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
(NR_to_hr
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) <
pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)

    
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel
(NR_to_hr
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
(NR_to_hr
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X) <
pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)

    
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel
(NR_to_hr
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
(NR_to_hr
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) +
 pr2 (hr_to_NR X)) <
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) +
 pr2 (hr_to_NR X))

    
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel
(NR_to_hr
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
(NR_to_hr
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) +
pr2 (hr_to_NR X) <
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) +
pr2 (hr_to_NR X)

    
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel
(NR_to_hr
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
(NR_to_hr
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)) <
pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X))

    now apply_pr2_in NR_to_hr_lt Hlt.
Qed.

Qed.

→ hr_lt_rel y z → hr_lt_rel (y * x)%ring (z * x)%ring

→ hr_lt_rel y z → hr_lt_rel (y * x)%ring (z * x)%ring

Hx0: hr_lt_rel 0%ring X
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y Z
hr_lt_rel (Y * X)%ring (Z * X)%ring

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hx0: hr_to_NRpos X ≠ 0 × hr_to_NRneg X = 0
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y Z
hr_lt_rel (Y * X)%ring (Z * X)%ring

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hx0: hr_to_NRpos X ≠ 0 × hr_to_NRneg X = 0
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y Z
hr_lt_rel
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y) * NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))%ring
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z) * NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))%ring

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hx0: hr_to_NRpos X ≠ 0 × hr_to_NRneg X = 0
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y Z
hr_lt_rel
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X),,
      pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)))
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X),,
      pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)))

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hx0: hr_to_NRpos X ≠ 0 × hr_to_NRneg X = 0
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y Z
hr_lt_rel
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * 0,,
      pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * 0 +
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)))
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * 0,,
      pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * 0 +
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)))

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hx0: hr_to_NRpos X ≠ 0 × hr_to_NRneg X = 0
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y Z
hr_lt_rel
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)))
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X),,
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)))

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hx0: hr_to_NRpos X ≠ 0 × hr_to_NRneg X = 0
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y Z
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) <
pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hx0: hr_to_NRpos X ≠ 0 × hr_to_NRneg X = 0
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y Z
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)) *
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) <
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)) *
pr1 (hr_to_NR X)

Hx0: hr_to_NRpos X ≠ 0 × hr_to_NRneg X = 0
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y Z
0 < pr1 (hr_to_NR X)

Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y Z
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) <
pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)

0 < pr1 (hr_to_NR X)

Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y Z
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) ≠ 0

    exact (pr1 Hx0).

pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) <

  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z))

    now rewrite !hr_to_NR_bij.
Qed.
