(** *** Appartness *)


isbinophrel apNonnegativeReals


isbinophrel apNonnegativeReals

  
∏ a b c : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
a ≠ b → (c * a)%multoperation ≠ (c * b)%multoperation
∏ a b c : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
a ≠ b → (a * c)%multoperation ≠ (b * c)%multoperation

  
∏ a b c : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
a ≠ b → (c * a)%multoperation ≠ (c * b)%multoperation
 
x, y, z: rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals
Hlt: x ≠ y
(z * x)%multoperation ≠ (z * y)%multoperation

    apply plusNonnegativeReals_apcompat_r, Hlt.
  
∏ a b c : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
a ≠ b → (a * c)%multoperation ≠ (b * c)%multoperation
 
x, y, z: rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals
Hlt: x ≠ y
(x * z)%multoperation ≠ (y * z)%multoperation

    apply plusNonnegativeReals_apcompat_l, Hlt.
Qed.
Definition hr_ap_rel : hrel hr_commring
  := rigtoringrel NonnegativeReals isbinophrel_apNonnegativeReals.


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
pr1 x + pr2 y ≠ pr1 y + pr2 x <->
hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
pr1 x + pr2 y ≠ pr1 y + pr2 x <->
hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr1 x + pr2 y ≠ pr1 y + pr2 x <->
hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr1 x + pr2 y ≠ pr1 y + pr2 x
→ hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)
→ pr1 x + pr2 y ≠ pr1 y + pr2 x

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr1 x + pr2 y ≠ pr1 y + pr2 x
→ hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)
 
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
H: pr1 x + pr2 y ≠ pr1 y + pr2 x
hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)

    
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
H: pr1 x + pr2 y ≠ pr1 y + pr2 x
(pr1 x + pr2 y + 0%NR)%ring
≠ (pr1 y + pr2 x + 0%NR)%ring

    apply plusNonnegativeReals_apcompat_l, H.
  
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr x) (NR_to_hr y)
→ pr1 x + pr2 y ≠ pr1 y + pr2 x
 
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
H: ∑ c0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
(pr111 (invweq
          (weqsubtypesdirprod
             (pr11 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                      (NR_to_hr y)))
             (pr12 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                      (NR_to_hr y))))
          (make_dirprod
             (x,,
              eqrelrefl
                (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                   (rigaddabmonoid
                      NonnegativeReals)) x)
             (y,,
              eqrelrefl
                (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                   (rigaddabmonoid
                      NonnegativeReals)) y))) *
 pr221 (invweq
          (weqsubtypesdirprod
             (pr11 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                      (NR_to_hr y)))
             (pr12 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                      (NR_to_hr y))))
          (make_dirprod
             (x,,
              eqrelrefl
                (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                   (rigaddabmonoid
                      NonnegativeReals)) x)
             (y,,
              eqrelrefl
                (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                   (rigaddabmonoid
                      NonnegativeReals)) y))) * c0)%multoperation
≠ (pr121 (invweq
            (weqsubtypesdirprod
               (pr11 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y)))
               (pr12 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y))))
            (make_dirprod
               (x,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) x)
               (y,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) y))) *
   pr211 (invweq
            (weqsubtypesdirprod
               (pr11 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y)))
               (pr12 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y))))
            (make_dirprod
               (x,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) x)
               (y,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) y))) *
   c0)%multoperation
pr1 x + pr2 y ≠ pr1 y + pr2 x

    
x, y: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
H: ∑ c0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
(pr111 (invweq
          (weqsubtypesdirprod
             (pr11 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                      (NR_to_hr y)))
             (pr12 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                      (NR_to_hr y))))
          (make_dirprod
             (x,,
              eqrelrefl
                (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                   (rigaddabmonoid
                      NonnegativeReals)) x)
             (y,,
              eqrelrefl
                (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                   (rigaddabmonoid
                      NonnegativeReals)) y))) *
 pr221 (invweq
          (weqsubtypesdirprod
             (pr11 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                      (NR_to_hr y)))
             (pr12 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                      (NR_to_hr y))))
          (make_dirprod
             (x,,
              eqrelrefl
                (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                   (rigaddabmonoid
                      NonnegativeReals)) x)
             (y,,
              eqrelrefl
                (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                   (rigaddabmonoid
                      NonnegativeReals)) y))) * c0)%multoperation
≠ (pr121 (invweq
            (weqsubtypesdirprod
               (pr11 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y)))
               (pr12 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y))))
            (make_dirprod
               (x,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) x)
               (y,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) y))) *
   pr211 (invweq
            (weqsubtypesdirprod
               (pr11 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y)))
               (pr12 (make_dirprod (NR_to_hr x)
                        (NR_to_hr y))))
            (make_dirprod
               (x,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) x)
               (y,,
                eqrelrefl
                  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
                     (rigaddabmonoid
                        NonnegativeReals)) y))) *
   c0)%multoperation
pr1 x + pr2 y + pr1 H ≠ pr1 y + pr2 x + pr1 H

    exact (pr2 H).
Qed.

(** Theorems about apartness *)


∏ X Y : hr_commring,
hr_ap_rel X Y <-> hr_lt_rel X Y ⨿ hr_lt_rel Y X


∏ X Y : hr_commring,
hr_ap_rel X Y <-> hr_lt_rel X Y ⨿ hr_lt_rel Y X

  
X, Y: hr_commring
hr_ap_rel X Y <-> hr_lt_rel X Y ⨿ hr_lt_rel Y X

  
X, Y: hr_commring
hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y)) <->
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
⨿ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))

  
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
⨿ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
⨿ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))

  
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
⨿ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
 
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) ≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
⨿ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))

    
X, Y: hr_commring
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
→ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
  ⨿ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
      (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))

    
X, Y: hr_commring
Hlt: (pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) < pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X))%Dcuts
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
⨿ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
X, Y: hr_commring
Hlt: (pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X) < pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y))%Dcuts
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
⨿ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))

    
X, Y: hr_commring
Hlt: (pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) < pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X))%Dcuts
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
⨿ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
 now left ; apply NR_to_hr_lt.
    
X, Y: hr_commring
Hlt: (pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X) < pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y))%Dcuts
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
⨿ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
 now right ; apply NR_to_hr_lt.
  
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
⨿ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
 
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
⨿ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)

    
X, Y: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
X, Y: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)

    
X, Y: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
 now left ; apply_pr2 NR_to_hr_lt.
    
X, Y: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
 now right ; apply_pr2 NR_to_hr_lt.
Qed.


istightap hr_ap_rel


istightap hr_ap_rel

  
isirrefl hr_ap_rel
issymm hr_ap_rel
iscotrans hr_ap_rel
istight hr_ap_rel

  
isirrefl hr_ap_rel
 
X: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel X X
∅

    
X: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
∅

    
X: hr_commring
Hap: pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X) ≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
∅

    
X: hr_commring
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X) → ∅

    now apply isirrefl_apNonnegativeReals.
  
issymm hr_ap_rel
 
X, Y: hr_commring
hr_ap_rel X Y → hr_ap_rel Y X

    
X, Y: hr_commring
hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
→ hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))

    
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X))

    
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)

    
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR X)) (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR X)

    now apply_pr2 NR_to_hr_ap.
  
iscotrans hr_ap_rel
 
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel X Z
hr_ap_rel X Y ∨ hr_ap_rel Y Z

    
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel X Z ⨿ hr_lt_rel Z X
hr_ap_rel X Y ∨ hr_ap_rel Y Z

    
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel X Z
hr_ap_rel X Y ∨ hr_ap_rel Y Z
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Z X
hr_ap_rel X Y ∨ hr_ap_rel Y Z

    
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel X Z
hr_ap_rel X Y ∨ hr_ap_rel Y Z
 
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel X Y ∨ hr_lt_rel Y Z
hr_ap_rel X Y ∨ hr_ap_rel Y Z

      
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel X Y
hr_ap_rel X Y ⨿ hr_ap_rel Y Z
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y Z
hr_ap_rel X Y ⨿ hr_ap_rel Y Z

      
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel X Y
hr_ap_rel X Y ⨿ hr_ap_rel Y Z
 
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel X Y
hr_lt_rel X Y ⨿ hr_lt_rel Y X

        now left.
      
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y Z
hr_ap_rel X Y ⨿ hr_ap_rel Y Z
 
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y Z
hr_lt_rel Y Z ⨿ hr_lt_rel Z Y

        now left.
    
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Z X
hr_ap_rel X Y ∨ hr_ap_rel Y Z
 
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Z Y ∨ hr_lt_rel Y X
hr_ap_rel X Y ∨ hr_ap_rel Y Z

      
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Z Y
hr_ap_rel X Y ⨿ hr_ap_rel Y Z
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y X
hr_ap_rel X Y ⨿ hr_ap_rel Y Z

      
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Z Y
hr_ap_rel X Y ⨿ hr_ap_rel Y Z
 
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Z Y
hr_lt_rel Y Z ⨿ hr_lt_rel Z Y

        now right.
      
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y X
hr_ap_rel X Y ⨿ hr_ap_rel Y Z
 
X, Y, Z: hr_commring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y X
hr_lt_rel X Y ⨿ hr_lt_rel Y X

        now right.
  
istight hr_ap_rel
 
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: ¬ hr_ap_rel X Y
X = Y

    
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: ¬ hr_ap_rel X Y
hr_le_rel X Y
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: ¬ hr_ap_rel X Y
hr_le_rel Y X

    
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: ¬ hr_ap_rel X Y
hr_le_rel X Y
 
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: ¬ hr_ap_rel X Y
¬ hr_lt_rel Y X

      
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: ¬ hr_ap_rel X Y
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y X
hr_ap_rel X Y

      
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: ¬ hr_ap_rel X Y
Hlt: hr_lt_rel Y X
hr_lt_rel X Y ⨿ hr_lt_rel Y X

      now right.
    
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: ¬ hr_ap_rel X Y
hr_le_rel Y X
 
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: ¬ hr_ap_rel X Y
¬ hr_lt_rel X Y

      
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: ¬ hr_ap_rel X Y
Hlt: hr_lt_rel X Y
hr_ap_rel X Y

      
X, Y: hr_commring
Hap: ¬ hr_ap_rel X Y
Hlt: hr_lt_rel X Y
hr_lt_rel X Y ⨿ hr_lt_rel Y X

      now left.
Qed.

(** Structures *)


islapbinop BinaryOperations.op1


islapbinop BinaryOperations.op1

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
((Y + X)%ring ≠ (Z + X)%ring)%tap → (Y ≠ Z)%tap

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
hr_ap_rel (Y + X)%ring (Z + X)%ring → hr_ap_rel Y Z

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: hr_ap_rel (Y + X)%ring (Z + X)%ring
hr_ap_rel Y Z

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: hr_ap_rel (Y + X)%ring (Z + X)%ring
hr_lt_rel Y Z ⨿ hr_lt_rel Z Y

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: hr_lt_rel (Y + X)%ring (Z + X)%ring ⨿ hr_lt_rel (Z + X)%ring (Y + X)%ring
hr_lt_rel Y Z ⨿ hr_lt_rel Z Y

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hlt: hr_lt_rel (Y + X)%ring (Z + X)%ring
hr_lt_rel Y Z ⨿ hr_lt_rel Z Y
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hlt: hr_lt_rel (Z + X)%ring (Y + X)%ring
hr_lt_rel Y Z ⨿ hr_lt_rel Z Y

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hlt: hr_lt_rel (Y + X)%ring (Z + X)%ring
hr_lt_rel Y Z ⨿ hr_lt_rel Z Y
 
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hlt: hr_lt_rel (Y + X)%ring (Z + X)%ring
hr_lt_rel Y Z

    
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hlt: hr_lt_rel (Y + X)%ring (Z + X)%ring
hr_lt_rel (Y + X)%ring (Z + X)%ring

    exact Hlt.
  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hlt: hr_lt_rel (Z + X)%ring (Y + X)%ring
hr_lt_rel Y Z ⨿ hr_lt_rel Z Y
 
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hlt: hr_lt_rel (Z + X)%ring (Y + X)%ring
hr_lt_rel Z Y

    
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hlt: hr_lt_rel (Z + X)%ring (Y + X)%ring
hr_lt_rel (Z + X)%ring (Y + X)%ring

    exact Hlt.
Qed.

israpbinop BinaryOperations.op1


israpbinop BinaryOperations.op1

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: ((X + Y)%ring ≠ (X + Z)%ring)%tap
(Y ≠ Z)%tap

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: ((X + Y)%ring ≠ (X + Z)%ring)%tap
((Y + X)%ring ≠ (Z + X)%ring)%tap

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: ((X + Y)%ring ≠ (X + Z)%ring)%tap
((X + Y)%ring ≠ (X + Z)%ring)%tap

  exact Hap.
Qed.


islapbinop BinaryOperations.op2


islapbinop BinaryOperations.op2

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
((Y * X)%ring ≠ (Z * X)%ring)%tap → (Y ≠ Z)%tap

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
hr_ap_rel (Y * X)%ring (Z * X)%ring → hr_ap_rel Y Z

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
hr_ap_rel
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X),,
      pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)))
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X),,
      pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
      pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)))
→ hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z))

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: hr_ap_rel
(NR_to_hr
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X),,
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)))
(NR_to_hr
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X),,
pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)))
hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z))

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X))
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X))
hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z))

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X))
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X))
(∏ Y Z : hr_commring,
 pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
 pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
 (pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
  pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)) =
 (pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)) *
 pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
 (pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Y)) *
 pr2 (hr_to_NR X))
→ hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z))
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X))
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X))
∏ Y Z : hr_commring,
pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
 pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)) =
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)) *
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Y)) *
pr2 (hr_to_NR X)

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X))
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X))
(∏ Y Z : hr_commring,
 pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
 pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
 (pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
  pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)) =
 (pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)) *
 pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
 (pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Y)) *
 pr2 (hr_to_NR X))
→ hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z))
 
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: (pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Z)) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
≠ (pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Y)) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z))

    
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: (pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)
≠ (pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)
∨ (pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Z)) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
≠ (pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Y)) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Y))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR Z))

    
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: (pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)
≠ (pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)
∨ (pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Z)) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
≠ (pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Y)) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)

    
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: (pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)
≠ (pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: (pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Z)) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
≠ (pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Y)) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)

    
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: (pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)
≠ (pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
 
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) ≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
∨ pr1 (hr_to_NR X) ≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR X)
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)

      
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) ≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: pr1 (hr_to_NR X) ≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR X)
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)

      
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) ≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
 exact Hap.
      
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: pr1 (hr_to_NR X) ≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR X)
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
 now eapply fromempty, (isirrefl_apNonnegativeReals _), Hap .
    
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: (pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Z)) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
≠ (pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Y)) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
 
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) ≠ pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Y)
∨ pr2 (hr_to_NR X) ≠ pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)

      
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) ≠ pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Y)
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: pr2 (hr_to_NR X) ≠ pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)

      
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) ≠ pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Y)
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
 
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) ≠ pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Y)
pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Y)
≠ pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Z)

        now apply issymm_apNonnegativeReals, Hap.
      
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: pr2 (hr_to_NR X) ≠ pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z)
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)
 now eapply fromempty, (isirrefl_apNonnegativeReals _), Hap.
  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X))
≠ pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X))
∏ Y Z : hr_commring,
pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
 pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)) =
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)) *
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Y)) *
pr2 (hr_to_NR X)
 
X: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Y, Z: hr_commring
pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
 pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)) =
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr2 (hr_to_NR Y)) *
pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) + pr1 (hr_to_NR Y)) *
pr2 (hr_to_NR X)

    
X: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Y, Z: hr_commring
pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
 pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)) =
pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
 pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X))

    
X: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Y, Z: hr_commring
pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
 (pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
  pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X))) =
pr1 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
 (pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
  pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X)))

    
X: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Y, Z: hr_commring
pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
 pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X)) =
pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
 pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X))

    
X: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Y, Z: hr_commring
pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
 pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X)) =
pr2 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr1 (hr_to_NR X) +
(pr2 (hr_to_NR Z) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X) +
 pr1 (hr_to_NR Y) * pr2 (hr_to_NR X))

    reflexivity.
Qed.

israpbinop BinaryOperations.op2


israpbinop BinaryOperations.op2

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: ((X * Y)%ring ≠ (X * Z)%ring)%tap
(Y ≠ Z)%tap

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: ((X * Y)%ring ≠ (X * Z)%ring)%tap
((Y * X)%ring ≠ (Z * X)%ring)%tap

  
X, Y, Z: hr_commring,, hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap
Hap: ((X * Y)%ring ≠ (X * Z)%ring)%tap
((X * Y)%ring ≠ (X * Z)%ring)%tap

  exact Hap.
Qed.


isnonzeroCR hr_commring (hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap)


isnonzeroCR hr_commring (hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap)

  
hr_ap_rel 1%ring 0%ring

  
hr_ap_rel (NR_to_hr (1,, 0)) (NR_to_hr (0,, 0))

  
pr1 (1,, 0) + pr2 (0,, 0) ≠ pr1 (0,, 0) + pr2 (1,, 0)

  
pr1 (1,, 0) ≠ pr1 (0,, 0)

  apply isnonzeroNonnegativeReals.
Qed.


∏ (x : hr_commring) (Hap : hr_lt_rel x 0%ring),
(NR_to_hr
   (0%NR,,
    invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x)
      (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hap))) * x)%ring =
1%ring


∏ (x : hr_commring) (Hap : hr_lt_rel x 0%ring),
(NR_to_hr
   (0%NR,,
    invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x)
      (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hap))) * x)%ring =
1%ring

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
(NR_to_hr
   (0%NR,,
    invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x)
      (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hap))) * x)%ring =
1%ring

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
(NR_to_hr
   (0%NR,,
    invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x)
      (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hap))) *
 NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))%ring = 1%ring

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
NR_to_hr
  (0 * pr1 (hr_to_NR x) +
   invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x)
     (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hap)) *
   pr2 (hr_to_NR x),,
   0 * pr2 (hr_to_NR x) +
   invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x)
     (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hap)) *
   pr1 (hr_to_NR x)) = 1%ring

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
NR_to_hr
  (invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x)
     (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hap)) *
   pr2 (hr_to_NR x),,
   invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x)
     (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hap)) *
   pr1 (hr_to_NR x)) = 1%ring

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
NR_to_hr
  (1,,
   invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x)
     (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hap)) *
   pr1 (hr_to_NR x)) = 1%ring

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
NR_to_hr
  (1,,
   invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x)
     (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hap)) *
   pr1 (hr_to_NR x)) = NR_to_hr (1,, 0)

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
1,,
invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x)
  (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hap)) *
pr1 (hr_to_NR x) = 1,, 0

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x)
  (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hap)) *
pr1 (hr_to_NR x) = 0

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x)
  (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hap)) *
pr1 (hr_to_NR x) = ?x * 0

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
pr1 (hr_to_NR x) = 0

  apply (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hap)).
Qed.

∏ (x : hr_commring) (Hap : hr_lt_rel x 0%ring),
(x *
 NR_to_hr
   (0%NR,,
    invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x)
      (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hap))))%ring =
1%ring


∏ (x : hr_commring) (Hap : hr_lt_rel x 0%ring),
(x *
 NR_to_hr
   (0%NR,,
    invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x)
      (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hap))))%ring =
1%ring

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
(x *
 NR_to_hr
   (0%NR,,
    invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x)
      (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hap))))%ring =
1%ring

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
(NR_to_hr
   (0%NR,,
    invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x)
      (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hap))) * x)%ring =
1%ring

  now apply (hr_islinv_neg x Hap).
Qed.


∏ (x : hr_commring) (Hap : hr_lt_rel 0%ring x),
(NR_to_hr
   (invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x)
      (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hap)),, 0%NR) *
 x)%ring = 1%ring


∏ (x : hr_commring) (Hap : hr_lt_rel 0%ring x),
(NR_to_hr
   (invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x)
      (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hap)),, 0%NR) *
 x)%ring = 1%ring

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
(NR_to_hr
   (invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x)
      (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hap)),, 0%NR) *
 x)%ring = 1%ring

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
(NR_to_hr
   (invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x)
      (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hap)),, 0%NR) *
 NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))%ring = 1%ring

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
NR_to_hr
  (invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x)
     (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hap)) *
   pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + 0 * pr2 (hr_to_NR x),,
   invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x)
     (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hap)) *
   pr2 (hr_to_NR x) + 0 * pr1 (hr_to_NR x)) = 1%ring

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
NR_to_hr
  (invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x)
     (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hap)) *
   pr1 (hr_to_NR x),,
   invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x)
     (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hap)) *
   pr2 (hr_to_NR x)) = 1%ring

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
NR_to_hr
  (1,,
   invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x)
     (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hap)) *
   pr2 (hr_to_NR x)) = 1%ring

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
NR_to_hr
  (1,,
   invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x)
     (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hap)) *
   pr2 (hr_to_NR x)) = NR_to_hr (1,, 0)

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
1,,
invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x)
  (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hap)) *
pr2 (hr_to_NR x) = 1,, 0

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x)
  (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hap)) *
pr2 (hr_to_NR x) = 0

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x)
  (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hap)) *
pr2 (hr_to_NR x) = ?x * 0

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
pr2 (hr_to_NR x) = 0

  apply (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hap)).
Qed.

∏ (x : hr_commring) (Hap : hr_lt_rel 0%ring x),
(x *
 NR_to_hr
   (invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x)
      (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hap)),, 0%NR))%ring =
1%ring


∏ (x : hr_commring) (Hap : hr_lt_rel 0%ring x),
(x *
 NR_to_hr
   (invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x)
      (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hap)),, 0%NR))%ring =
1%ring

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
(x *
 NR_to_hr
   (invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x)
      (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hap)),, 0%NR))%ring =
1%ring

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
(NR_to_hr
   (invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x)
      (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hap)),, 0%NR) *
 x)%ring = 1%ring

  now apply (hr_islinv_pos x Hap).
Qed.


∏ x : hr_commring,
hr_ap_rel x 0%ring → multinvpair hr_commring x


∏ x : hr_commring,
hr_ap_rel x 0%ring → multinvpair hr_commring x

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel x 0%ring
multinvpair hr_commring x

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel x 0%ring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
multinvpair hr_commring x
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel x 0%ring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
multinvpair hr_commring x

  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel x 0%ring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
multinvpair hr_commring x
 
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel x 0%ring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
(?x' * x)%multoperation = 0%addmonoid
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel x 0%ring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
(x * ?x')%multoperation = 0%addmonoid

    
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel x 0%ring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
(?x' * x)%multoperation = 0%addmonoid
 
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel x 0%ring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
hr_lt_rel x 0%ring

      exact Hlt.
    
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel x 0%ring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel x 0%ring
(x *
 NR_to_hr
   (0,,
    invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x)
      (pr2 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_negative x) Hlt))))%multoperation =
0%addmonoid
 exact (hr_isrinv_neg _ _).
  
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel x 0%ring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
multinvpair hr_commring x
 
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel x 0%ring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
(?x' * x)%multoperation = 0%addmonoid
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel x 0%ring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
(x * ?x')%multoperation = 0%addmonoid

    
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel x 0%ring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
(?x' * x)%multoperation = 0%addmonoid
 
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel x 0%ring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
hr_lt_rel 0%ring x

      exact Hlt.
    
x: hr_commring
Hap: hr_ap_rel x 0%ring
Hlt: hr_lt_rel 0%ring x
(x *
 NR_to_hr
   (invNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x)
      (pr1 (pr2 (hr_to_NR_positive x) Hlt)),, 0))%multoperation =
0%addmonoid
 exact (hr_isrinv_pos _ _).
Defined.


ConstructiveField


ConstructiveField

  
∑ R : tightap hr_commring,
isapbinop BinaryOperations.op1
× isapbinop BinaryOperations.op2
  × isConstrDivRig hr_commring R

  
isapbinop BinaryOperations.op1
× isapbinop BinaryOperations.op2
  × isConstrDivRig hr_commring
      (hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap)

  
islapbinop BinaryOperations.op1
israpbinop BinaryOperations.op1
islapbinop BinaryOperations.op2
israpbinop BinaryOperations.op2
isnonzeroCR hr_commring (hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap)
∏ x : hr_commring,
(hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap) x 0%rig
→ multinvpair hr_commring x

  
islapbinop BinaryOperations.op1
 exact islapbinop_plus.
  
israpbinop BinaryOperations.op1
 exact israpbinop_plus.
  
islapbinop BinaryOperations.op2
 exact islapbinop_mult.
  
israpbinop BinaryOperations.op2
 exact israpbinop_mult.
  
isnonzeroCR hr_commring (hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap)
 exact hr_ap_0_1.
  
∏ x : hr_commring,
(hr_ap_rel,, istightap_hr_ap) x 0%rig
→ multinvpair hr_commring x
 exact hr_ex_inv.
Defined.

(** ** hr_abs *)

Definition hr_abs (x : hr_ConstructiveField) : NonnegativeReals :=
  maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x) (hr_to_NRneg x).


∏ x : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
hr_abs (NR_to_hr x) <=
maxNonnegativeReals (pr1 x) (pr2 x)


∏ x : NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals,
hr_abs (NR_to_hr x) <=
maxNonnegativeReals (pr1 x) (pr2 x)

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
hr_abs (NR_to_hr x) <=
maxNonnegativeReals (pr1 x) (pr2 x)

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos (NR_to_hr x))
  (hr_to_NRneg (NR_to_hr x)) <=
maxNonnegativeReals (pr1 x) (pr2 x)

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
maxNonnegativeReals (pr1 x - pr2 x) (pr2 x - pr1 x) <=
maxNonnegativeReals (pr1 x) (pr2 x)

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr1 x - pr2 x <= maxNonnegativeReals (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr2 x - pr1 x <= maxNonnegativeReals (pr1 x) (pr2 x)

  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr1 x - pr2 x <= maxNonnegativeReals (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
 
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr1 x - pr2 x <= pr1 x

    now apply minusNonnegativeReals_le.
  
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr2 x - pr1 x <= maxNonnegativeReals (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
 
x: NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals
pr2 x - pr1 x <= pr2 x

    now apply minusNonnegativeReals_le.
Qed.


∏ x : hr_ConstructiveField,
hr_abs (- x)%ring = hr_abs x


∏ x : hr_ConstructiveField,
hr_abs (- x)%ring = hr_abs x

  
x: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs (- x)%ring = hr_abs x

  
x: hr_ConstructiveField
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos (- x)%ring)
  (hr_to_NRneg (- x)%ring) =
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x) (hr_to_NRneg x)

  
x: hr_ConstructiveField
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x) (hr_to_NRpos x) =
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x) (hr_to_NRneg x)

  apply iscomm_maxNonnegativeReals.
Qed.


∏ x y : hr_ConstructiveField,
hr_abs (x + y)%ring <= hr_abs x + hr_abs y


∏ x y : hr_ConstructiveField,
hr_abs (x + y)%ring <= hr_abs x + hr_abs y

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs (x + y)%ring <= hr_abs x + hr_abs y

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x) + NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))%ring <=
hr_abs x + hr_abs y

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr1 (hr_to_NR y),,
      pr2 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR y))) <=
hr_abs x + hr_abs y

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr1 (hr_to_NR y),,
      pr2 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR y))) <= ?y
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
?y <= hr_abs x + hr_abs y

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr1 (hr_to_NR y),,
      pr2 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR y))) <= ?y
 apply NR_to_hr_abs. 
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
maxNonnegativeReals
  (pr1
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr1 (hr_to_NR y),,
      pr2 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR y)))
  (pr2
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr1 (hr_to_NR y),,
      pr2 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR y))) <=
hr_abs x + hr_abs y

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
pr1 (hr_to_NR x) <= hr_abs x
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
pr1 (hr_to_NR y) <= hr_abs y
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
pr2 (hr_to_NR x) <= hr_abs x
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
pr2 (hr_to_NR y) <= hr_abs y

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
pr1 (hr_to_NR x) <= hr_abs x
 apply maxNonnegativeReals_le_l.
  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
pr1 (hr_to_NR y) <= hr_abs y
 apply maxNonnegativeReals_le_l.
  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
pr2 (hr_to_NR x) <= hr_abs x
 apply maxNonnegativeReals_le_r.
  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
pr2 (hr_to_NR y) <= hr_abs y
 apply maxNonnegativeReals_le_r.
Qed.


∏ x y : hr_ConstructiveField,
hr_abs x - hr_abs y <= hr_abs (x + y)%ring


∏ x y : hr_ConstructiveField,
hr_abs x - hr_abs y <= hr_abs (x + y)%ring

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs x - hr_abs y <= hr_abs (x + y)%ring

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs x - hr_abs y + hr_abs y <=
hr_abs (x + y)%ring + hr_abs y

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_abs x) (hr_abs y) <=
hr_abs (x + y)%ring + hr_abs y

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs x <= hr_abs (x + y)%ring + hr_abs y
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs y <= hr_abs (x + y)%ring + hr_abs y

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs x <= hr_abs (x + y)%ring + hr_abs y
 
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
x = (x + y - y)%ring
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
Hx: x = (x + y - y)%ring
hr_abs x <= hr_abs (x + y)%ring + hr_abs y

    
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
x = (x + y - y)%ring
 now rewrite ringassoc1, ringrinvax1, ringrunax1. 
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
Hx: x = (x + y - y)%ring
hr_abs x <= hr_abs (x + y)%ring + hr_abs y

    
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
Hx: x = (x + y - y)%ring
hr_abs (x + y - y)%ring <=
hr_abs (x + y)%ring + hr_abs y

    
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
Hx: x = (x + y - y)%ring
hr_abs (x + y - y)%ring <=
hr_abs (x + y)%ring + hr_abs (- y)%ring

    apply istriangle_hr_abs.
  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs y <= hr_abs (x + y)%ring + hr_abs y
 apply plusNonnegativeReals_le_r.
Qed.


∏ x y : hr_ConstructiveField,
hr_abs x - hr_abs y <= hr_abs (x - y)%ring


∏ x y : hr_ConstructiveField,
hr_abs x - hr_abs y <= hr_abs (x - y)%ring

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs x - hr_abs y <= hr_abs (x - y)%ring

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs x - hr_abs (- y)%ring <= hr_abs (x - y)%ring

  apply istriangle_hr_abs'.
Qed.


∏ x y z t : NonnegativeReals,
x <= y → z <= t → x * z <= y * t


∏ x y z t : NonnegativeReals,
x <= y → z <= t → x * z <= y * t

  
x, y, z, t: NonnegativeReals
H: x <= y
H0: z <= t
x * z <= y * t

  
x, y, z, t: NonnegativeReals
H: x <= y
H0: z <= t
x * z <= x * t

  apply multNonnegativeReals_lecompat_r', H0.
Qed.

∏ x y : NonnegativeReals, 0 < x ∧ 0 < y <-> 0 < x * y


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals, 0 < x ∧ 0 < y <-> 0 < x * y

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals
0 < x ∧ 0 < y <-> 0 < x * y

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals
0 < x ∧ 0 < y → 0 < x * y
x, y: NonnegativeReals
0 < x * y → 0 < x ∧ 0 < y

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals
0 < x ∧ 0 < y → 0 < x * y
 
x, y: NonnegativeReals
H: 0 < x ∧ 0 < y
0 < x * y

    
x, y: NonnegativeReals
H: 0 < x ∧ 0 < y
0 * y < x * y

    
x, y: NonnegativeReals
H: 0 < x ∧ 0 < y
0 < y
x, y: NonnegativeReals
H: 0 < x ∧ 0 < y
0 < x

    
x, y: NonnegativeReals
H: 0 < x ∧ 0 < y
0 < y
 apply (pr2 H).
    
x, y: NonnegativeReals
H: 0 < x ∧ 0 < y
0 < x
 apply (pr1 H).
  
x, y: NonnegativeReals
0 < x * y → 0 < x ∧ 0 < y
 
x, y: NonnegativeReals
H: 0 < x * y
0 < x
x, y: NonnegativeReals
H: 0 < x * y
0 < y

    
x, y: NonnegativeReals
H: 0 < x * y
0 < x
 
x, y: NonnegativeReals
H: 0 < x * y
0 * ?x < x * ?x

      
x, y: NonnegativeReals
H: 0 < x * y
0 < x * ?x

      exact H.
    
x, y: NonnegativeReals
H: 0 < x * y
0 < y
 
x, y: NonnegativeReals
H: 0 < x * y
?x * 0 < ?x * y

      
x, y: NonnegativeReals
H: 0 < x * y
0 < ?x * y

      exact H.
Qed.

∏ x y z : NonnegativeReals,
z < maxNonnegativeReals x y → z < x ∨ z < y


∏ x y z : NonnegativeReals,
z < maxNonnegativeReals x y → z < x ∨ z < y

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
z < maxNonnegativeReals x y → z < x ∨ z < y

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
H: z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
z < x ∨ z < y

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
H: z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
z < x ∨ x < maxNonnegativeReals x y → z < x ∨ z < y

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
H: z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
(z < x) ⨿ (x < maxNonnegativeReals x y)
→ (z < x) ⨿ (z < y)

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
H: z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hx: z < x
(z < x) ⨿ (z < y)
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
H: z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hx: x < maxNonnegativeReals x y
(z < x) ⨿ (z < y)

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
H: z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hx: z < x
(z < x) ⨿ (z < y)
 now left.
  
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
H: z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hx: x < maxNonnegativeReals x y
(z < x) ⨿ (z < y)
 
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
H: z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hx: x < maxNonnegativeReals x y
z < y

    
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
H: z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hx: x < maxNonnegativeReals x y
z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
H: z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hx: x < maxNonnegativeReals x y
x <= y

    
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
H: z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hx: x < maxNonnegativeReals x y
z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
 apply H.
    
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
H: z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hx: x < maxNonnegativeReals x y
x <= y
 
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
H: z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hx: x < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hy: y < x
∅

      
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
H: z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hx: x < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hy: y < x
maxNonnegativeReals x y < maxNonnegativeReals x y

      
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
H: z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hx: x < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hy: y < x
x < maxNonnegativeReals x y
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
H: z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hx: x < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hy: y < x
y < maxNonnegativeReals x y

      
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
H: z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hx: x < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hy: y < x
x < maxNonnegativeReals x y
 exact Hx.
      
x, y, z: NonnegativeReals
H: z < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hx: x < maxNonnegativeReals x y
Hy: y < x
y < maxNonnegativeReals x y
 now apply istrans_ltNonnegativeReals with x.
Qed.


∏ x y : hr_ConstructiveField,
hr_abs (x * y)%ring = hr_abs x * hr_abs y


∏ x y : hr_ConstructiveField,
hr_abs (x * y)%ring = hr_abs x * hr_abs y

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs (x * y)%ring = hr_abs x * hr_abs y

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x) * NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR y))%ring =
hr_abs x * hr_abs y

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs
  (NR_to_hr
     (pr1 (hr_to_NR x) * pr1 (hr_to_NR y) +
      pr2 (hr_to_NR x) * pr2 (hr_to_NR y),,
      pr1 (hr_to_NR x) * pr2 (hr_to_NR y) +
      pr2 (hr_to_NR x) * pr1 (hr_to_NR y))) =
hr_abs x * hr_abs y

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs
  (NR_to_hr
     (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRpos y +
      hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y,,
      hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y +
      hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y)) =
hr_abs x * hr_abs y

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs
  (NR_to_hr
     (maxNonnegativeReals
        (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRpos y)
        (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y),,
      maxNonnegativeReals
        (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
        (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y))) =
hr_abs x * hr_abs y
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
0 < hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y
→ hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y = 0
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
0 < hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRpos y
→ hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y = 0

  
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
hr_abs
  (NR_to_hr
     (maxNonnegativeReals
        (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRpos y)
        (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y),,
      maxNonnegativeReals
        (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
        (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y))) =
hr_abs x * hr_abs y
 
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
maxNonnegativeReals
  (hr_to_NRpos
     (NR_to_hr
        (maxNonnegativeReals
           (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRpos y)
           (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y),,
         maxNonnegativeReals
           (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
           (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y))))
  (hr_to_NRneg
     (NR_to_hr
        (maxNonnegativeReals
           (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRpos y)
           (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y),,
         maxNonnegativeReals
           (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
           (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y)))) =
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x) (hr_to_NRneg x) *
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos y) (hr_to_NRneg y)

    
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
maxNonnegativeReals
  (maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRpos y)
     (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y))
  (maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
     (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y)) =
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x) (hr_to_NRneg x) *
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos y) (hr_to_NRneg y)
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
0 <
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRpos y)
  (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y)
→ maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
    (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y) = 0
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
0 <
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRpos y)
  (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y)
→ maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
    (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y) = 0

    
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
maxNonnegativeReals
  (maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRpos y)
     (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y))
  (maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
     (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y)) =
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x) (hr_to_NRneg x) *
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos y) (hr_to_NRneg y)
 
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
maxNonnegativeReals
  (maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRpos y)
     (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y))
  (maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
     (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y)) =
maxNonnegativeReals
  (maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRpos y)
     (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y))
  (maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
     (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y))

      
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRpos y)
  (maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y)
     (maxNonnegativeReals
        (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
        (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y))) =
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRpos y)
  (maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y)
     (maxNonnegativeReals
        (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
        (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y)))

      
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y)
  (maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
     (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y)) =
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y)
  (maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
     (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y))

      
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
  (maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y)
     (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y)) =
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y)
  (maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
     (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y))

      
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y)
  (maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y)
     (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)) =
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y)
  (maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
     (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y))

      
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y)
  (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y) =
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
  (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y)

      apply iscomm_maxNonnegativeReals.
    
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
0 <
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRpos y)
  (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y)
→ maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
    (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y) = 0
 
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
H: 0 <
maxNonnegativeReals
  (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRpos y)
  (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y)
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
  (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y) = 0

      
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
H: 0 < hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRpos y
∨ 0 < hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
  (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y) = 0

      
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField

∨ 0 < hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRneg y
maxNonnegativeReals (hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y)
  (hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y) <= 0

      
x, y: hr_ConstructiveField
H: 0 < hr_to_NRpos x ∧ 0 < hr_to_NRpos y
hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y = 0

hr_to_NRneg x * hr_to_NRpos y = 0

hr_to_NRpos x * hr_to_NRneg y = 0
 now rewrite (hr_to_NRposneg_zero _ (pr2 H)), israbsorb_zero_multNonnegativeReals.

H: 0 < hr_to_NRpos x ∧ 0 < hr_to_NRpos y

 exact (pr1 H).
Qed.

(** ** Archimedean *)


nat_to_hr 0 = 0%ring


nat_to_hr 0 = 0%ring

  
NR_to_hr (nat_to_NonnegativeReals 0,, 0) = 0%ring

  
NR_to_hr (0,, 0) = 0%ring

  reflexivity.
Qed.


∏ n : nat, nat_to_hr (S n) = (1 + nat_to_hr n)%ring


∏ n : nat, nat_to_hr (S n) = (1 + nat_to_hr n)%ring

  
n: nat
nat_to_hr (S n) = (1 + nat_to_hr n)%ring

  
n: nat
NR_to_hr (nat_to_NonnegativeReals (S n),, 0) =
(1 + NR_to_hr (nat_to_NonnegativeReals n,, 0%NR))%ring

  
n: nat
NR_to_hr (1 + nat_to_NonnegativeReals n,, 0) =
(1 + NR_to_hr (nat_to_NonnegativeReals n,, 0%NR))%ring

  
n: nat
NR_to_hr (1 + nat_to_NonnegativeReals n,, 0) =
NR_to_hr
  (pr1 (1,, 0) + pr1 (nat_to_NonnegativeReals n,, 0),,
   pr2 (1,, 0) + pr2 (nat_to_NonnegativeReals n,, 0))

  
n: nat
NR_to_hr (1 + nat_to_NonnegativeReals n,, 0) =
NR_to_hr
  (pr1 (1,, 0) + pr1 (nat_to_NonnegativeReals n,, 0),,
   pr2 (1,, 0))

  reflexivity.
Qed.


isarchCF (λ x y : hr_ConstructiveField, hr_lt_rel y x)


isarchCF (λ x y : hr_ConstructiveField, hr_lt_rel y x)

  
isbinophrel gtNonnegativeReals
Hadd: isbinophrel gtNonnegativeReals
isarchCF (λ x y : hr_ConstructiveField, hr_lt_rel y x)

  
isbinophrel gtNonnegativeReals
 
a, b, c: rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals
gtNonnegativeReals a b
→ gtNonnegativeReals (c * a)%multoperation
    (c * b)%multoperation
a, b, c: rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals
gtNonnegativeReals a b
→ gtNonnegativeReals (a * c)%multoperation
    (b * c)%multoperation

    
a, b, c: rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals
gtNonnegativeReals a b
→ gtNonnegativeReals (c * a)%multoperation
    (c * b)%multoperation
 apply plusNonnegativeReals_ltcompat_r.
    
a, b, c: rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals
gtNonnegativeReals a b
→ gtNonnegativeReals (a * c)%multoperation
    (b * c)%multoperation
 apply plusNonnegativeReals_ltcompat_l.

    now apply istrans_ltNonnegativeReals with b.

setquot_aux gtNonnegativeReals y1 y2
→ ∃ n : nat,
  setquot_aux gtNonnegativeReals
    (nattorig n * y1)%ring
    (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring

setquot_aux gtNonnegativeReals

  (y2 * c)%multoperation

  (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring
∑ c : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
gtNonnegativeReals
  ((nattorig (pr1 n) * y1)%ring * c)%multoperation
  ((1%rig + nattorig (pr1 n) * y2)%ring * c)%multoperation

Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals

c: ∑ c : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
gtNonnegativeReals (y1 * c)%multoperation
  (y2 * c)%multoperation
Hc: y2 < y1

gtNonnegativeReals (nattorig n * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring
gtNonnegativeReals
  ((nattorig (pr1 n) * y1)%ring * 0)%multoperation
  ((1%rig + nattorig (pr1 n) * y2)%ring * 0)%multoperation

      
Hadd: isbinophrel gtNonnegativeReals
Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals
H:= NonnegativeReals_Archimedean: isarchrig gtNonnegativeReals
y1, y2: NonnegativeReals
c: ∑ c : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
gtNonnegativeReals (y1 * c)%multoperation
  (y2 * c)%multoperation
Hc: y2 < y1
n: ∑ n : nat,
gtNonnegativeReals (nattorig n * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring
(1%rig + nattorig (pr1 n) * y2)%ring <
(nattorig (pr1 n) * y1)%ring

      exact (pr2 n).

x: NonnegativeReals
(∃ n : nat, gtNonnegativeReals (nattorig n) x)
→ ∃ n : nat,
  setquot_aux gtNonnegativeReals (nattorig n) x

      
Hadd: isbinophrel gtNonnegativeReals
Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals
H:= NonnegativeReals_Archimedean: isarchrig gtNonnegativeReals
x: NonnegativeReals
(∑ n : nat, gtNonnegativeReals (nattorig n) x)
→ ∑ n : nat,
  setquot_aux gtNonnegativeReals (nattorig n) x

Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals

x: NonnegativeReals
n: ∑ n : nat, gtNonnegativeReals (nattorig n) x

Hadd: isbinophrel gtNonnegativeReals
Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals

x: NonnegativeReals
n: ∑ n : nat, gtNonnegativeReals (nattorig n) x
setquot_aux gtNonnegativeReals (nattorig (pr1 n)) x

      
Hadd: isbinophrel gtNonnegativeReals
Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals
H:= NonnegativeReals_Archimedean: isarchrig gtNonnegativeReals
x: NonnegativeReals
n: ∑ n : nat, gtNonnegativeReals (nattorig n) x
∑ c : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
gtNonnegativeReals
  (nattorig (pr1 n) * c)%multoperation
  (x * c)%multoperation

      
Hadd: isbinophrel gtNonnegativeReals
Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals
H:= NonnegativeReals_Archimedean: isarchrig gtNonnegativeReals
x: NonnegativeReals
n: ∑ n : nat, gtNonnegativeReals (nattorig n) x
gtNonnegativeReals
  (nattorig (pr1 n) * 0)%multoperation
  (x * 0)%multoperation

Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals
H:= NonnegativeReals_Archimedean: isarchrig gtNonnegativeReals
x: NonnegativeReals
n: ∑ n : nat, gtNonnegativeReals (nattorig n) x
x < nattorig (pr1 n)

      exact (pr2 n).

Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals
H:= NonnegativeReals_Archimedean: isarchrig gtNonnegativeReals

Hadd: isbinophrel gtNonnegativeReals

x: NonnegativeReals
n: ∑ n : nat,
gtNonnegativeReals (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig
∑ c : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
gtNonnegativeReals
  ((nattorig (pr1 n) + x)%ring * c)%multoperation
  (0%rig * c)%multoperation

      
Hadd: isbinophrel gtNonnegativeReals
Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals
H:= NonnegativeReals_Archimedean: isarchrig gtNonnegativeReals
x: NonnegativeReals
n: ∑ n : nat,

  ((nattorig (pr1 n) + x)%ring * 0)%multoperation
  (0%rig * 0)%multoperation

      
Hadd: isbinophrel gtNonnegativeReals
Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals
H:= NonnegativeReals_Archimedean: isarchrig gtNonnegativeReals
x: NonnegativeReals
n: ∑ n : nat,
gtNonnegativeReals (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig
0%rig < (nattorig (pr1 n) + x)%ring

      exact (pr2 n). 
Hadd: isbinophrel gtNonnegativeReals
Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals
Harch: isarchrig (setquot_aux gtNonnegativeReals)
isarchCF (λ x y : hr_ConstructiveField, hr_lt_rel y x)

Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals
Harch: isarchrig (setquot_aux gtNonnegativeReals)
x: hr_ConstructiveField
∃ n : nat, hr_lt_rel x (nattoring n)

Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals
Harch: isarchrig (setquot_aux gtNonnegativeReals)

(∃ n : nat,
 rigtoringrel NonnegativeReals Hadd (nattoring n) x)
→ ∃ n : nat, hr_lt_rel x (nattoring n)

→ ∑ n : nat, hr_lt_rel x (nattoring n)

Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals
Harch: isarchrig (setquot_aux gtNonnegativeReals)
x: hr_ConstructiveField
n: ∑ n : nat,
rigtoringrel NonnegativeReals Hadd (nattoring n) x
∑ n : nat, hr_lt_rel x (nattoring n)

hr_lt_rel x (nattoring (pr1 n))

  
Hadd: isbinophrel gtNonnegativeReals
Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals
Harch: isarchrig (setquot_aux gtNonnegativeReals)
x: hr_ConstructiveField
n: nat
Hn: rigtoringrel NonnegativeReals Hadd 
  (nattoring n) x
hr_lt_rel x (nattoring n)

  
Hadd: isbinophrel gtNonnegativeReals
Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals
Harch: isarchrig (setquot_aux gtNonnegativeReals)
x: hr_ConstructiveField
n: nat
Hn: rigtoringrel NonnegativeReals Hadd 
  (nattoring n) x
hr_lt_rel x (nattoring n)

  
Hadd: isbinophrel gtNonnegativeReals
Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals
Harch: isarchrig (setquot_aux gtNonnegativeReals)
x: hr_ConstructiveField
n: nat
Hn: rigtoringrel NonnegativeReals Hadd
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR (nattoring n)))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR (nattoring n)))

  
Hadd: isbinophrel gtNonnegativeReals
Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals
Harch: isarchrig (setquot_aux gtNonnegativeReals)
x: hr_ConstructiveField
n: nat
rigtoringrel NonnegativeReals Hadd
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR (nattoring n)))
  (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
→ hr_lt_rel (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR x))
    (NR_to_hr (hr_to_NR (nattoring n)))

  
Hadd: isbinophrel gtNonnegativeReals
Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals
Harch: isarchrig (setquot_aux gtNonnegativeReals)
x: hr_ConstructiveField
n: nat
(∑ c0 : Dcuts,
 hrel_reverse Dcuts_lt_rel
   (pr1 (hr_to_NR (nattoring n)) + pr2 (hr_to_NR x) +
    c0)%ring
   (pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR (nattoring n)) +
    c0)%ring)
→ ∑ c0 : Dcuts,
  Dcuts_lt_rel
    (pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR (nattoring n)) +
     c0)%ring
    (pr1 (hr_to_NR (nattoring n)) + pr2 (hr_to_NR x) +
     c0)%ring

  
Hadd: isbinophrel gtNonnegativeReals
Htra: istrans gtNonnegativeReals
Harch: isarchrig (setquot_aux gtNonnegativeReals)
x: hr_ConstructiveField
n: nat
c: ∑ c0 : Dcuts,
hrel_reverse Dcuts_lt_rel
  (pr1 (hr_to_NR (nattoring n)) + pr2 (hr_to_NR x) +
   c0)%ring
  (pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR (nattoring n)) +
   c0)%ring
∑ c0 : Dcuts,
Dcuts_lt_rel
  (pr1 (hr_to_NR x) + pr2 (hr_to_NR (nattoring n)) +
   c0)%ring
  (pr1 (hr_to_NR (nattoring n)) + pr2 (hr_to_NR x) +
   c0)%ring

  exact c.
Qed.

(** ** Completeness *)


u: nat → hr_ConstructiveField
hProp


u: nat → hr_ConstructiveField
hProp

  
u: nat → hr_ConstructiveField
isaprop
  (∏ c : NonnegativeReals,
   0 < c
   → ∃ N : nat,
     ∏ n m : nat,
     N ≤ n → N ≤ m → hr_abs (u m - u n)%ring < c)

  
u: nat → hr_ConstructiveField
t: NonnegativeReals
isaprop
  (0 < t
   → ∃ N : nat,
     ∏ n m : nat,
     N ≤ n → N ≤ m → hr_abs (u m - u n)%ring < t)

  
u: nat → hr_ConstructiveField
t: NonnegativeReals
isaprop
  (∃ N : nat,
   ∏ n m : nat,
   N ≤ n → N ≤ m → hr_abs (u m - u n)%ring < t)

  apply pr2.
Defined.

Hm: pr1 N ≤ m

x n <= x m + hr_abs (u m - u n)%ring

    
u: nat → hr_ConstructiveField
x:= λ n : nat, hr_to_NRpos (u n): nat → NonnegativeReals
y:= λ n : nat, hr_to_NRneg (u n): nat → NonnegativeReals

n, m: nat
Hn: pr1 N ≤ n
Hm: pr1 N ≤ m

x n <= x m + hr_abs (- - u n - u m)%ring

x n <= x m + hr_abs ((- - u n)%abgr - u m)%ring

n, m: nat

u: nat → hr_ConstructiveField
x:= λ n : nat, hr_to_NRpos (u n): nat → NonnegativeReals
y:= λ n : nat, hr_to_NRneg (u n): nat → NonnegativeReals
Hxy: ∏ n : nat, NR_to_hr (x n,, y n) = u n
Cu: Cauchy_seq u
c: NonnegativeReals
Hc: 0 < c
N: ∑ N : nat,
∏ n m : nat,
N ≤ n → N ≤ m → hr_abs (u m - u n)%ring < c
n, m: nat
Hn: pr1 N ≤ n
Hm: pr1 N ≤ m
Hu: x m + hr_abs (u m - u n)%ring < x m + c
x n <= x m + (hr_to_NRpos (u n) - hr_to_NRpos (u m))

    
u: nat → hr_ConstructiveField
x:= λ n : nat, hr_to_NRpos (u n): nat → NonnegativeReals
y:= λ n : nat, hr_to_NRneg (u n): nat → NonnegativeReals
Hxy: ∏ n : nat, NR_to_hr (x n,, y n) = u n
Cu: Cauchy_seq u
c: NonnegativeReals
Hc: 0 < c

∏ n m : nat,
N ≤ n → N ≤ m → hr_abs (u m - u n)%ring < c
n, m: nat
Hn: pr1 N ≤ n
Hm: pr1 N ≤ m
Hu: x m + hr_abs (u m - u n)%ring < x m + c
x n <= x m + (x n - x m)

    
u: nat → hr_ConstructiveField
x:= λ n : nat, hr_to_NRpos (u n): nat → NonnegativeReals
y:= λ n : nat, hr_to_NRneg (u n): nat → NonnegativeReals

Cu: Cauchy_seq u
c: NonnegativeReals

N: ∑ N : nat,
∏ n m : nat,
N ≤ n → N ≤ m → hr_abs (u m - u n)%ring < c

Hn: pr1 N ≤ n
Hm: pr1 N ≤ m

  apply pr2.
Defined.
Definition ex_lim_seq (u : nat → hr_ConstructiveField) := ∑ l, is_lim_seq u l.

c: NonnegativeReals

u: nat → hr_ConstructiveField

N ≤ n → x n < lx + c / 2 × lx < x n + c / 2
Ny: ∑ N : nat,
∏ n : nat,
N ≤ n → y n < ly + c / 2 × ly < y n + c / 2

n: nat

Hn: max (pr1 Nx) (pr1 Ny) ≤ n
hr_to_NRneg (NR_to_hr (x n + ly,, y n + lx)) < c
 
u: nat → hr_ConstructiveField
Cu: Cauchy_seq u
x:= λ n : nat, hr_to_NRpos (u n): nat → NonnegativeReals
y:= λ n : nat, hr_to_NRneg (u n): nat → NonnegativeReals
Hxy: ∏ n : nat, NR_to_hr (x n,, y n) = u n
lx, ly, c: NonnegativeReals
Hc: 0 < c / 2
Nx: ∑ N : nat,
∏ n : nat,
N ≤ n → x n < lx + c / 2 × lx < x n + c / 2
Ny: ∑ N : nat,
∏ n : nat,
N ≤ n → y n < ly + c / 2 × ly < y n + c / 2
n: nat
Hn: max (pr1 Nx) (pr1 Ny) ≤ n
pr2 (x n + ly,, y n + lx) - pr1 (x n + ly,, y n + lx) <
c

x n + ly +

x n + ly + c

      now apply_pr2 ispositive_halfNonnegativeReals.
Qed.

(** * Interface for Reals *)

Definition Reals : ConstructiveField := hr_ConstructiveField.

(** ** Operations and relations *)

Definition Rap : hrel Reals := CFap.
Definition Rlt : hrel Reals := hr_lt_rel.
Definition Rgt : hrel Reals := λ x y : Reals, Rlt y x.
Definition Rle : hrel Reals := hr_le_rel.
Definition Rge : hrel Reals := λ x y : Reals, Rle y x.

Definition Rzero : Reals := CFzero.
Definition Rplus : binop Reals := CFplus.
Definition Ropp : unop Reals := CFopp.
Definition Rminus : binop Reals := CFminus.

Definition Rone : Reals := CFone.
Definition Rmult : binop Reals := CFmult.
Definition Rinv : ∏ x : Reals, (Rap x Rzero) -> Reals := CFinv.
Definition Rdiv : Reals -> ∏ y : Reals, (Rap y Rzero) -> Reals := CFdiv.

Definition Rtwo : Reals := Rplus Rone Rone.
Definition Rabs : Reals → NonnegativeReals := hr_abs.

Definition NRNRtoR : NonnegativeReals → NonnegativeReals → Reals := λ (x y : NonnegativeReals), NR_to_hr (x,,y).
Definition RtoNRNR : Reals → NonnegativeReals × NonnegativeReals := λ x : Reals, (hr_to_NR x).

Declare Scope R_scope.
Delimit Scope R_scope with R.
Local Open Scope R_scope.

Infix "≠" := Rap : R_scope.
Infix "<" := Rlt : R_scope.
Infix ">" := Rgt : R_scope.
Infix "<=" := Rle : R_scope.
Infix ">=" := Rge : R_scope.

Notation "0" := Rzero : R_scope.
Notation "1" := Rone : R_scope.
Notation "2" := Rtwo : R_scope.
Infix "+" := Rplus : R_scope.
Notation "- x" := (Ropp x) : R_scope.
Infix "-" := Rminus : R_scope.
Infix "*" := Rmult : R_scope.
Notation "/ x" := (Rinv (pr1 x) (pr2 x)) : R_scope.
Notation "x / y" := (Rdiv x (pr1 y) (pr2 y)) : R_scope.

(** ** NRNRtoR and RtoNRNR *)


∏ x : Reals,
NRNRtoR (pr1 (RtoNRNR x)) (pr2 (RtoNRNR x)) = x


∏ x : Reals,
NRNRtoR (pr1 (RtoNRNR x)) (pr2 (RtoNRNR x)) = x

  
X: Reals
NRNRtoR (pr1 (RtoNRNR X)) (pr2 (RtoNRNR X)) = X

  
X: Reals
NR_to_hr (pr1 (RtoNRNR X),, pr2 (RtoNRNR X)) = X

  apply hr_to_NR_bij.
Qed.


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals,
RtoNRNR (NRNRtoR x y) = (x - y)%NR,, (y - x)%NR


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals,
RtoNRNR (NRNRtoR x y) = (x - y)%NR,, (y - x)%NR

  
X, Y: NonnegativeReals
RtoNRNR (NRNRtoR X Y) = (X - Y)%NR,, (Y - X)%NR

  
X, Y: NonnegativeReals
hr_to_NR (NR_to_hr (X,, Y)) = (X - Y)%NR,, (Y - X)%NR

  
X, Y: NonnegativeReals
setquotuniv
  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
     (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))
  ((∑ _ : NonnegativeReals, NonnegativeReals),,
   isasetdirprod NonnegativeReals NonnegativeReals
     (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals))
     (pr211 (pr1 NonnegativeReals)))
  (λ x : abmonoiddirprod
           (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
           (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals),
   (pr1 x - pr2 x)%NR,, (pr2 x - pr1 x)%NR)
  iscomprelfun_hr_to_NR
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) (X,, Y)) =
(X - Y)%NR,, (Y - X)%NR

  now rewrite setquotunivcomm.
Qed.


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals, pr1 (NRNRtoR x y) (x,, y)


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals, pr1 (NRNRtoR x y) (x,, y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals
pr1 (NRNRtoR x y) (x,, y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals
∑ x0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
(pr1 (x,, y) * pr2 (x,, y) * x0)%multoperation =
(pr1 (x,, y) * pr2 (x,, y) * x0)%multoperation

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals
(x + y + 0%NR)%ring = (x + y + 0%NR)%ring

  reflexivity.
Qed.


NRNRtoR 0%NR 0%NR = 0


NRNRtoR 0%NR 0%NR = 0

  
setquotpr
  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
     (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) (0%NR,, 0%NR) =
0

  
0 (0%NR,, 0%NR)

  
∑ x0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
(pr112 (pr2
          (abmonoiddirprod
             (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
             (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))) *
 pr2 (0%NR,, 0%NR) * x0)%multoperation =
(pr1 (0%NR,, 0%NR) *
 pr212 (pr2
          (abmonoiddirprod
             (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)
             (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals))) * x0)%multoperation

  
(0%addmonoid + 0%NR + 0%NR)%ring =
(0%NR + 0%addmonoid + 0%NR)%ring

  reflexivity.
Qed.

NRNRtoR 1%NR 0%NR = 1


NRNRtoR 1%NR 0%NR = 1

  
setquotpr
  (binopeqrelabgrdiff
     (rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals)) (1%NR,, 0%NR) =
1

  
1 (1%NR,, 0%NR)

  
∑ x0 : rigaddabmonoid NonnegativeReals,
(pr1 (rigtoringunel2int NonnegativeReals) *
 pr2 (1%NR,, 0%NR) * x0)%multoperation =
(pr1 (1%NR,, 0%NR) *
 pr2 (rigtoringunel2int NonnegativeReals) * x0)%multoperation

  
(1%rig + 0%NR + 0%NR)%ring =
(1%NR + 0%rig + 0%NR)%ring

  reflexivity.
Qed.


∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeReals,
(x + y')%NR = (x' + y)%NR <->
NRNRtoR x y = NRNRtoR x' y'


∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeReals,
(x + y')%NR = (x' + y)%NR <->
NRNRtoR x y = NRNRtoR x' y'

  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeReals
(x + y')%NR = (x' + y)%NR <->
NRNRtoR x y = NRNRtoR x' y'

  apply (NR_to_hr_eq (x,,y) (x' ,, y')).
Qed.

∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeReals,
(x + y' ≠ x' + y)%NR <-> NRNRtoR x y ≠ NRNRtoR x' y'


∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeReals,
(x + y' ≠ x' + y)%NR <-> NRNRtoR x y ≠ NRNRtoR x' y'

  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeReals
(x + y' ≠ x' + y)%NR <-> NRNRtoR x y ≠ NRNRtoR x' y'

  apply (NR_to_hr_ap (x,,y) (x' ,, y')).
Qed.

∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeReals,
(x + y' < x' + y)%NR <-> NRNRtoR x y < NRNRtoR x' y'


∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeReals,
(x + y' < x' + y)%NR <-> NRNRtoR x y < NRNRtoR x' y'

  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeReals
(x + y' < x' + y)%NR <-> NRNRtoR x y < NRNRtoR x' y'

  apply (NR_to_hr_lt (x,,y) (x' ,, y')).
Qed.

∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeReals,
(x + y' <= x' + y)%NR <-> NRNRtoR x y <= NRNRtoR x' y'


∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeReals,
(x + y' <= x' + y)%NR <-> NRNRtoR x y <= NRNRtoR x' y'

  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeReals
(x + y' <= x' + y)%NR <-> NRNRtoR x y <= NRNRtoR x' y'

  apply (NR_to_hr_le (x,,y) (x' ,, y')).
Qed.


∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeReals,
NRNRtoR (x + x')%NR (y + y')%NR =
NRNRtoR x y + NRNRtoR x' y'


∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeReals,
NRNRtoR (x + x')%NR (y + y')%NR =
NRNRtoR x y + NRNRtoR x' y'

  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeReals
NRNRtoR (x + x')%NR (y + y')%NR =
NRNRtoR x y + NRNRtoR x' y'

  apply pathsinv0, NR_to_hr_plus.
Qed.

∏ x y : NonnegativeReals, NRNRtoR y x = - NRNRtoR x y


∏ x y : NonnegativeReals, NRNRtoR y x = - NRNRtoR x y

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals
NRNRtoR y x = - NRNRtoR x y

  apply pathsinv0, NR_to_hr_opp.
Qed.

∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeReals,
NRNRtoR (x + y')%NR (y + x')%NR =
NRNRtoR x y - NRNRtoR x' y'


∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeReals,
NRNRtoR (x + y')%NR (y + x')%NR =
NRNRtoR x y - NRNRtoR x' y'

  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeReals
NRNRtoR (x + y')%NR (y + x')%NR =
NRNRtoR x y - NRNRtoR x' y'

  apply pathsinv0, NR_to_hr_minus.
Qed.

∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeReals,
NRNRtoR (x * x' + y * y')%NR (x * y' + y * x')%NR =
NRNRtoR x y * NRNRtoR x' y'


∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeReals,
NRNRtoR (x * x' + y * y')%NR (x * y' + y * x')%NR =
NRNRtoR x y * NRNRtoR x' y'

  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeReals
NRNRtoR (x * x' + y * y')%NR (x * y' + y * x')%NR =
NRNRtoR x y * NRNRtoR x' y'

  apply pathsinv0, NR_to_hr_mult.
Qed.

∏ (x : NonnegativeReals) (Hrn : (x ≠ 0)%NR)
(Hr : NRNRtoR x 0%NR ≠ 0),
NRNRtoR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn) 0%NR =
Rinv (NRNRtoR x 0%NR) Hr


∏ (x : NonnegativeReals) (Hrn : (x ≠ 0)%NR)
(Hr : NRNRtoR x 0%NR ≠ 0),
NRNRtoR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn) 0%NR =
Rinv (NRNRtoR x 0%NR) Hr

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR x 0%NR ≠ 0
NRNRtoR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn) 0%NR =
Rinv (NRNRtoR x 0%NR) Hr

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR x 0%NR ≠ 0
(NRNRtoR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn) 0%NR * 1)%CF =
(Rinv (NRNRtoR x 0%NR) Hr * 1)%CF

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR x 0%NR ≠ 0
(NRNRtoR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn) 0%NR *
 (NRNRtoR x 0%NR * CFinv (NRNRtoR x 0%NR) Hr))%CF =
(Rinv (NRNRtoR x 0%NR) Hr *
 (NRNRtoR x 0%NR * CFinv (NRNRtoR x 0%NR) Hr))%CF

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR x 0%NR ≠ 0
(NRNRtoR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn) 0%NR *
 NRNRtoR x 0%NR * CFinv (NRNRtoR x 0%NR) Hr)%CF =
(Rinv (NRNRtoR x 0%NR) Hr * NRNRtoR x 0%NR *
 CFinv (NRNRtoR x 0%NR) Hr)%CF

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR x 0%NR ≠ 0
(NRNRtoR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn) 0%NR *
 NRNRtoR x 0%NR)%CF =
(Rinv (NRNRtoR x 0%NR) Hr * NRNRtoR x 0%NR)%CF

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR x 0%NR ≠ 0
NRNRtoR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn * x + 0 * 0)%NR
  (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn * 0 + 0 * x)%NR =
(Rinv (NRNRtoR x 0%NR) Hr * NRNRtoR x 0%NR)%CF

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR x 0%NR ≠ 0
NRNRtoR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn * x + 0 * 0)%NR
  (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn * 0 + 0 * x)%NR =
(CFinv (NRNRtoR x 0%NR) Hr * NRNRtoR x 0%NR)%CF

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR x 0%NR ≠ 0
NRNRtoR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn * x + 0 * 0)%NR
  (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn * 0 + 0 * x)%NR = 1%CF

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR x 0%NR ≠ 0
NRNRtoR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn * x + 0)%NR
  (0 + 0)%NR = 1%CF

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR x 0%NR ≠ 0
NRNRtoR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn * x)%NR 0%NR = 1%CF

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR x 0%NR ≠ 0
NRNRtoR 1%NR 0%NR = 1%CF

  apply NRNRtoR_one.
Qed.

∏ (x : NonnegativeReals) (Hrn : (x ≠ 0)%NR)
(Hr : NRNRtoR 0%NR x ≠ 0),
NRNRtoR 0%NR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn) =
Rinv (NRNRtoR 0%NR x) Hr


∏ (x : NonnegativeReals) (Hrn : (x ≠ 0)%NR)
(Hr : NRNRtoR 0%NR x ≠ 0),
NRNRtoR 0%NR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn) =
Rinv (NRNRtoR 0%NR x) Hr

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR 0%NR x ≠ 0
NRNRtoR 0%NR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn) =
Rinv (NRNRtoR 0%NR x) Hr

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR 0%NR x ≠ 0
(NRNRtoR 0%NR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn) * 1)%CF =
(Rinv (NRNRtoR 0%NR x) Hr * 1)%CF

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR 0%NR x ≠ 0
(NRNRtoR 0%NR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn) *
 (NRNRtoR 0%NR x * CFinv (NRNRtoR 0%NR x) Hr))%CF =
(Rinv (NRNRtoR 0%NR x) Hr *
 (NRNRtoR 0%NR x * CFinv (NRNRtoR 0%NR x) Hr))%CF

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR 0%NR x ≠ 0
(NRNRtoR 0%NR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn) *
 NRNRtoR 0%NR x * CFinv (NRNRtoR 0%NR x) Hr)%CF =
(Rinv (NRNRtoR 0%NR x) Hr * NRNRtoR 0%NR x *
 CFinv (NRNRtoR 0%NR x) Hr)%CF

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR 0%NR x ≠ 0
(NRNRtoR 0%NR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn) *
 NRNRtoR 0%NR x)%CF =
(Rinv (NRNRtoR 0%NR x) Hr * NRNRtoR 0%NR x)%CF

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR 0%NR x ≠ 0
NRNRtoR (0 * 0 + invNonnegativeReals x Hrn * x)%NR
  (0 * x + invNonnegativeReals x Hrn * 0)%NR =
(Rinv (NRNRtoR 0%NR x) Hr * NRNRtoR 0%NR x)%CF

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR 0%NR x ≠ 0
NRNRtoR (0 * 0 + invNonnegativeReals x Hrn * x)%NR
  (0 * x + invNonnegativeReals x Hrn * 0)%NR =
(CFinv (NRNRtoR 0%NR x) Hr * NRNRtoR 0%NR x)%CF

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR 0%NR x ≠ 0
NRNRtoR (0 * 0 + invNonnegativeReals x Hrn * x)%NR
  (0 * x + invNonnegativeReals x Hrn * 0)%NR = 1%CF

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR 0%NR x ≠ 0
NRNRtoR (0 + invNonnegativeReals x Hrn * x)%NR
  (0 + 0)%NR = 1%CF

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR 0%NR x ≠ 0
NRNRtoR (invNonnegativeReals x Hrn * x)%NR 0%NR = 1%CF

  
x: NonnegativeReals
Hrn: (x ≠ 0)%NR
Hr: NRNRtoR 0%NR x ≠ 0
NRNRtoR 1%NR 0%NR = 1%CF

  apply NRNRtoR_one.
Qed.


∏ x : Reals, (pr1 (RtoNRNR x) <= Rabs x)%NR


∏ x : Reals, (pr1 (RtoNRNR x) <= Rabs x)%NR

  
x: Reals
(pr1 (RtoNRNR x) <= Rabs x)%NR

  
x: Reals
(pr1
   (RtoNRNR
      (NRNRtoR (pr1 (RtoNRNR x)) (pr2 (RtoNRNR x)))) <=
 Rabs (NRNRtoR (pr1 (RtoNRNR x)) (pr2 (RtoNRNR x))))%NR

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals
(x - y <= Rabs (NRNRtoR x y))%NR

  apply maxNonnegativeReals_le_l.
Qed.

∏ x : Reals, (pr2 (RtoNRNR x) <= Rabs x)%NR


∏ x : Reals, (pr2 (RtoNRNR x) <= Rabs x)%NR

  
x: Reals
(pr2 (RtoNRNR x) <= Rabs x)%NR

  
x: Reals
(pr2
   (RtoNRNR
      (NRNRtoR (pr1 (RtoNRNR x)) (pr2 (RtoNRNR x)))) <=
 Rabs (NRNRtoR (pr1 (RtoNRNR x)) (pr2 (RtoNRNR x))))%NR

  
x, y: NonnegativeReals
(y - x <= Rabs (NRNRtoR x y))%NR

  apply maxNonnegativeReals_le_r.
Qed.

(** ** Theorems about apartness and order *)


0 < 1


0 < 1

  
NRNRtoR 0%NR 0%NR < NRNRtoR 1%NR 0%NR

  
(0 + 0 < 1 + 0)%NR

  
(0 < 1)%NR

  
(1 ≠ 0)%NR

  apply isnonzeroNonnegativeReals.
Qed.

∏ x : Reals, ¬ (x < x)

  exact (isirrefl_isStrongOrder (isStrongOrder_hr_lt)).
Qed.

  exact (istrans_isStrongOrder (isStrongOrder_hr_lt)).
Qed.

Qed.

x, y, z: Reals
0 < x → y < z → (y * x)%CF < (z * x)%CF

  now apply Rmult_ltcompat_l.
Qed.

  exact hr_mult_ltcompat_r'.

  exact CFmult_apcompat_l.

  exact CFmult_apcompat_l'.

(** ** Algrebra *)


∏ x : Reals, 0 + x = x


∏ x : Reals, 0 + x = x

  exact islunit_CFzero_CFplus.
Qed.

∏ x : Reals, x + 0 = x


∏ x : Reals, x + 0 = x

  exact isrunit_CFzero_CFplus.
Qed.

∏ x y z : Reals, x + y + z = x + (y + z)


∏ x y z : Reals, x + y + z = x + (y + z)

  exact isassoc_CFplus.
Qed.

∏ x : Reals, - x + x = 0


∏ x : Reals, - x + x = 0

  exact islinv_CFopp.
Qed.

∏ x : Reals, x + - x = 0


∏ x : Reals, x + - x = 0

  exact isrinv_CFopp.
Qed.


∏ x y : Reals, x + y = y + x


∏ x y : Reals, x + y = y + x

  exact iscomm_CFplus.
Qed.

∏ x : Reals, 1 * x = x


∏ x : Reals, 1 * x = x

  exact islunit_CFone_CFmult.
Qed.

∏ x : Reals, x * 1 = x


∏ x : Reals, x * 1 = x

  exact isrunit_CFone_CFmult.
Qed.

∏ x y z : Reals, x * y * z = x * (y * z)


∏ x y z : Reals, x * y * z = x * (y * z)

  exact isassoc_CFmult.
Qed.

∏ x y : Reals, x * y = y * x


∏ x y : Reals, x * y = y * x

  exact iscomm_CFmult.
Qed.

∏ (x : Reals) (Hx0 : x ≠ 0), Rinv x Hx0 * x = 1


∏ (x : Reals) (Hx0 : x ≠ 0), Rinv x Hx0 * x = 1

  exact islinv_CFinv.
Qed.

∏ (x : Reals) (Hx0 : x ≠ 0), x * Rinv x Hx0 = 1


∏ (x : Reals) (Hx0 : x ≠ 0), x * Rinv x Hx0 = 1

  exact isrinv_CFinv.
Qed.

∏ x : Reals, 0 * x = 0


∏ x : Reals, 0 * x = 0

  exact islabsorb_CFzero_CFmult.
Qed.

∏ x : Reals, x * 0 = 0


∏ x : Reals, x * 0 = 0

  exact israbsorb_CFzero_CFmult.
Qed.

∏ x y z : Reals, z * (x + y) = z * x + z * y


∏ x y z : Reals, z * (x + y) = z * x + z * y

  exact isldistr_CFplus_CFmult.
Qed.

∏ x y z : Reals, (x + y) * z = x * z + y * z


∏ x y z : Reals, (x + y) * z = x * z + y * z

  exact isrdistr_CFplus_CFmult.
Qed.

(** ** Rabs *)


∏ x y : Reals, (Rabs (x + y)%R <= Rabs x + Rabs y)%NR


∏ x y : Reals, (Rabs (x + y)%R <= Rabs x + Rabs y)%NR

  exact istriangle_hr_abs.
Qed.

∏ x y : Reals, (Rabs x - Rabs y <= Rabs (x + y)%R)%NR


∏ x y : Reals, (Rabs x - Rabs y <= Rabs (x + y)%R)%NR

  exact istriangle_hr_abs'.
Qed.


∏ x y : Reals, Rabs (x * y) = (Rabs x * Rabs y)%NR


∏ x y : Reals, Rabs (x * y) = (Rabs x * Rabs y)%NR

  exact hr_abs_mult.
Qed.


∏ x : Reals, Rabs (- x) = Rabs x


∏ x : Reals, Rabs (- x) = Rabs x

  
x: Reals
Rabs (- x) = Rabs x

  
x: Reals
Rabs (- NRNRtoR (pr1 (RtoNRNR x)) (pr2 (RtoNRNR x))) =
Rabs (NRNRtoR (pr1 (RtoNRNR x)) (pr2 (RtoNRNR x)))

  apply iscomm_maxNonnegativeReals.
Qed.
